class Category(ModelWithMetadata, MPTTModel, SeoModel):
    name = models.CharField(max_length=250)
    slug = models.SlugField(max_length=255, unique=True, allow_unicode=True)
    description = SanitizedJSONField(blank=True, null=True, sanitizer=clean_editorjs)
    description_plaintext = TextField(blank=True)
    updated_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now=True, blank=True, null=True)
    parent = models.ForeignKey(
        "self", null=True, blank=True, related_name="children", on_delete=models.CASCADE
    )
    background_image = models.ImageField(
        upload_to="category-backgrounds", blank=True, null=True
    )
    background_image_alt = models.CharField(max_length=128, blank=True)

    objects = models.Manager()
    tree = TreeManager()  # type: ignore[django-manager-missing]

    class Meta:
        indexes = [
            *ModelWithMetadata.Meta.indexes,
            GinIndex(
                name="category_search_name_slug_gin",
                # `opclasses` and `fields` should be the same length
                fields=["name", "slug", "description_plaintext"],
                opclasses=["gin_trgm_ops"] * 3,
            ),
            BTreeIndex(fields=["updated_at"], name="updated_at_idx"),
        ]

    def __str__(self) -> str:
        return self.name


class CategoryTranslation(SeoModelTranslationWithSlug):
    category = models.ForeignKey(
        Category, related_name="translations", on_delete=models.CASCADE
    )
    name = models.CharField(max_length=128, blank=True, null=True)
    description = SanitizedJSONField(blank=True, null=True, sanitizer=clean_editorjs)

    class Meta:
        constraints = [
            models.UniqueConstraint(
                fields=["language_code", "slug"],
                name="uniq_lang_slug_categorytransl",
            ),
        ]
        unique_together = (("language_code", "category"),)

    def __str__(self) -> str:
        return self.name or str(self.pk)

    def __repr__(self) -> str:
        class_ = type(self)
        return f"{class_.__name__}(pk={self.pk!r}, name={self.name!r}, category_pk={self.category_id!r})"

    def get_translated_object_id(self):
        return "Category", self.category_id

    def get_translated_keys(self):
        translated_keys = super().get_translated_keys()
        translated_keys.update(
            {
                "name": self.name,
                "description": self.description,
            }
        )
        return translated_keys


class ProductType(ModelWithMetadata):
    name = models.CharField(max_length=250)
    slug = models.SlugField(max_length=255, unique=True, allow_unicode=True)
    kind = models.CharField(max_length=32, choices=ProductTypeKind.CHOICES)
    is_shipping_required = models.BooleanField(default=True)

    # Note: has no effect, it's only kept for backward-compatibility as some users
    #       use that field. Will be removed in Saleor v3.24.0
    is_digital = models.BooleanField(default=False)

    weight = MeasurementField(
        measurement=Weight,
        unit_choices=WeightUnits.CHOICES,
        default=zero_weight,
    )
    tax_class = models.ForeignKey(
        TaxClass,
        related_name="product_types",
        on_delete=models.SET_NULL,
        blank=True,
        null=True,
    )

    # DEPRECATED, does not affect the variant creation anymore
    has_variants = models.BooleanField(default=True)

    class Meta(ModelWithMetadata.Meta):
        ordering = ("slug",)
        app_label = "product"
        permissions = (
            (
                ProductTypePermissions.MANAGE_PRODUCT_TYPES_AND_ATTRIBUTES.codename,
                "Manage product types and attributes.",
            ),
        )
        indexes = [
            *ModelWithMetadata.Meta.indexes,
            GinIndex(
                name="product_type_search_gin",
                # `opclasses` and `fields` should be the same length
                fields=["name", "slug"],
                opclasses=["gin_trgm_ops"] * 2,
            ),
        ]

class Product(SeoModel, ModelWithMetadata, ModelWithExternalReference):
    product_type = models.ForeignKey(

    )
    name = models.CharField(max_length=250)
    slug = models.SlugField(max_length=255, unique=True, allow_unicode=True)
    description = SanitizedJSONField(blank=True, null=True, sanitizer=clean_editorjs)
    description_plaintext = TextField(blank=True)
    search_document = models.TextField(blank=True, default="")
    search_vector = SearchVectorField(blank=True, null=True)
    search_index_dirty = models.BooleanField(default=False, db_index=True)

    category = models.ForeignKey(
        Category,
        related_name="products",
        on_delete=models.SET_NULL,
        null=True,
        blank=True,
    )
    created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True, db_index=True)
    updated_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now=True, db_index=True)
    weight = MeasurementField(
        measurement=Weight,
        unit_choices=WeightUnits.CHOICES,
        blank=True,
        null=True,
    )
    default_variant = models.OneToOneField(
        "ProductVariant",
        blank=True,
        null=True,
        on_delete=models.SET_NULL,
        related_name="+",
    )
    rating = models.FloatField(null=True, blank=True)
    tax_class = models.ForeignKey(
        TaxClass,
        related_name="products",
        blank=True,
        null=True,
        on_delete=models.SET_NULL,
    )

    objects = managers.ProductManager()

    class Meta:
        app_label = "product"
        ordering = ("slug",)
        permissions = (
            (ProductPermissions.MANAGE_PRODUCTS.codename, "Manage products."),
        )
        indexes = [
            GinIndex(
                name="product_search_gin",
                fields=["search_document"],
                opclasses=["gin_trgm_ops"],
            ),
            GinIndex(
                name="product_tsearch",
                fields=["search_vector"],
            ),
            GinIndex(
                name="product_gin",
                fields=["name", "slug"],
                opclasses=["gin_trgm_ops"] * 2,
            ),
            models.Index(
                fields=["category_id", "slug"],
            ),
        ]
        indexes.extend(ModelWithMetadata.Meta.indexes)

    def __iter__(self):
        if not hasattr(self, "__variants"):
            setattr(self, "__variants", self.variants.all())
        return iter(getattr(self, "__variants"))

    def __repr__(self) -> str:
        return f"<Product: pk={self.pk!r}, name={self.name!r}>"

    def __str__(self) -> str:
        return self.name

    def get_first_image(self):
        all_media = self.media.all()
        images = [media for media in all_media if media.type == ProductMediaTypes.IMAGE]
        return images[0] if images else None

    @staticmethod
    def sort_by_attribute_fields() -> list:
        return ["concatenated_values_order", "concatenated_values", "name"]

class ProductVariant(SortableModel, ModelWithMetadata, ModelWithExternalReference):
    sku = models.CharField(max_length=255, unique=True, null=True, blank=True)
    name = models.CharField(max_length=255, blank=True)
    product = models.ForeignKey(
        Product, related_name="variants", on_delete=models.CASCADE
    )
    media = models.ManyToManyField(
        "product.ProductMedia", through="product.VariantMedia"
    )
    track_inventory = models.BooleanField(default=True)
    is_preorder = models.BooleanField(default=False)
    preorder_end_date = models.DateTimeField(null=True, blank=True)
    preorder_global_threshold = models.IntegerField(blank=True, null=True)
    quantity_limit_per_customer = models.IntegerField(
        blank=True, null=True, validators=[MinValueValidator(1)]
    )
    created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True, db_index=True)
    updated_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now=True, db_index=True)

    weight = MeasurementField(
        measurement=Weight,
        unit_choices=WeightUnits.CHOICES,
        blank=True,
        null=True,
    )

    objects = managers.ProductVariantManager()

    class Meta(ModelWithMetadata.Meta):
        ordering = ("sort_order", "sku")
        app_label = "product"
        indexes = [
            *ModelWithMetadata.Meta.indexes,
            GinIndex(
                name="variant_gin",
                fields=["name", "sku"],
                opclasses=["gin_trgm_ops"] * 2,
            ),
        ]

    def __str__(self) -> str:
        return self.name or self.sku or f"ID:{self.pk}"

    def get_global_id(self):
        return graphene.Node.to_global_id("ProductVariant", self.id)

    def get_base_price(
        self,
        channel_listing: "ProductVariantChannelListing",
        price_override: Optional["Decimal"] = None,
    ) -> "Money":
        """Return the base variant price before applying the promotion discounts."""
        return (
            channel_listing.price
            if price_override is None
            else Money(price_override, channel_listing.currency)
        )

    def get_price(
        self,
        channel_listing: "ProductVariantChannelListing",
        price_override: Optional["Decimal"] = None,
        promotion_rules: Iterable["PromotionRule"] | None = None,
    ) -> "Money":
        """Return the variant discounted price with applied promotions.

        If a custom price is provided, return the price with applied discounts from
        valid promotion rules for this variant.
        """
        from ..discount.utils.promotion import calculate_discounted_price_for_rules

        if price_override is None:
            return channel_listing.discounted_price or channel_listing.price
        price: Money = self.get_base_price(channel_listing, price_override)
        rules = promotion_rules or []
        return calculate_discounted_price_for_rules(
            price=price, rules=rules, currency=channel_listing.currency
        )

    def get_prior_price_amount(
        self,
        channel_listing: Optional["ProductVariantChannelListing"],
    ) -> Decimal | None:
        if channel_listing is None or channel_listing.prior_price is None:
            return None

        return channel_listing.prior_price.amount

    def get_weight(self):
        return self.weight or self.product.weight or self.product.product_type.weight

    def is_shipping_required(self) -> bool:
        return self.product.product_type.is_shipping_required

    def is_gift_card(self) -> bool:
        return self.product.product_type.kind == ProductTypeKind.GIFT_CARD

    def get_ordering_queryset(self):
        return self.product.variants.all()

    def is_preorder_active(self):
        return self.is_preorder and (
            self.preorder_end_date is None or timezone.now() <= self.preorder_end_date
        )

        blank=True, db_default={}, default=dict, encoder=CustomJsonEncoder
    )
    tax_class_metadata = JSONField(
        blank=True, db_default={}, default=dict, encoder=CustomJsonEncoder
    )

    is_price_overridden = models.BooleanField(null=True, blank=True)

    # Fulfilled when voucher code was used for product in the line
    voucher_code = models.CharField(max_length=255, null=True, blank=True)

    # Fulfilled when sale was applied to product in the line
    sale_id = models.CharField(max_length=255, null=True, blank=True)

    # The date time when the line should refresh its prices.
    # It depends on channel.draft_order_line_price_freeze_period setting.
    draft_base_price_expire_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)

    class Meta(ModelWithMetadata.Meta):
        ordering = ("created_at", "id")

        indexes = [
            *ModelWithMetadata.Meta.indexes,
            BTreeIndex(fields=["product_type_id"], name="product_type_id_btree_idx"),
        ]

    def __str__(self):
        return (
            f"{self.product_name} ({self.variant_name})"
            if self.variant_name
            else self.product_name
        )

    @property
    def quantity_unfulfilled(self):
        return self.quantity - self.quantity_fulfilled


class Fulfillment(ModelWithMetadata):
    fulfillment_order = models.PositiveIntegerField(editable=False)
    order = models.ForeignKey(
        Order,
        related_name="fulfillments",
        editable=False,
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
    )
    status = models.CharField(
        max_length=32,
        default=FulfillmentStatus.FULFILLED,
        choices=FulfillmentStatus.CHOICES,
    )
    tracking_number = models.CharField(max_length=255, default="", blank=True)
    created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
    reason = models.TextField(blank=True, default="")
    reason_reference = models.ForeignKey(
        "page.Page",
        related_name="+",
        on_delete=models.SET_NULL,
        null=True,
        blank=True,
        db_index=False,
    )

    shipping_refund_amount = models.DecimalField(
        max_digits=settings.DEFAULT_MAX_DIGITS,
        decimal_places=settings.DEFAULT_DECIMAL_PLACES,
        null=True,
        blank=True,
    )

"""Checkout-related ORM models."""

import datetime
from decimal import Decimal

from django.conf import settings

def get_default_country():
    return settings.DEFAULT_COUNTRY


class CheckoutDelivery(models.Model):
    """Model to cache shipping methods for a checkout."""

    id = models.UUIDField(primary_key=True, editable=False, unique=True, default=uuid4)
    checkout = models.ForeignKey(
        "checkout.Checkout",
        related_name="deliveries",
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
    )
    external_shipping_method_id = models.CharField(
        max_length=1024, blank=True, null=True, editable=False, db_index=True
    )
    built_in_shipping_method_id = models.IntegerField(
        blank=True, null=True, editable=False, db_index=True
    )

    name = models.CharField(max_length=255)
    description = models.TextField(null=True, blank=True)

    price = MoneyField(amount_field="price_amount", currency_field="currency")
    price_amount = models.DecimalField(
        max_digits=settings.DEFAULT_MAX_DIGITS,
        decimal_places=settings.DEFAULT_DECIMAL_PLACES,
    )
    currency = models.CharField(
        max_length=settings.DEFAULT_CURRENCY_CODE_LENGTH,
    )

    maximum_delivery_days = models.PositiveIntegerField(null=True, blank=True)
    minimum_delivery_days = models.PositiveIntegerField(null=True, blank=True)
    metadata = models.JSONField(default=dict)
    private_metadata = models.JSONField(default=dict)

    active = models.BooleanField(default=True)
    message = models.TextField(blank=True, null=True)

    is_external = models.BooleanField(default=False)
    is_valid = models.BooleanField(default=True)

    created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
    updated_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now=True)

    # Denormalized tax class data
    tax_class_id = models.IntegerField(null=True, blank=True)
    tax_class_name = models.CharField(max_length=255, null=True, blank=True)
    tax_class_private_metadata = models.JSONField(
        blank=True, db_default={}, default=dict, encoder=CustomJsonEncoder
    )
    tax_class_metadata = models.JSONField(
        blank=True, db_default={}, default=dict, encoder=CustomJsonEncoder
    )

    @property
    def shipping_method_id(self) -> str:
        return self.external_shipping_method_id or str(self.built_in_shipping_method_id)

    class Meta:
        constraints = [
            models.UniqueConstraint(
                fields=[
                    "checkout",
                    "external_shipping_method_id",
                    "built_in_shipping_method_id",
                    "is_valid",
                ],
                name="unique_for_checkout",
                nulls_distinct=False,
            ),
        ]
        ordering = ("created_at", "pk")


class Checkout(models.Model):
    """A shopping checkout."""

    created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
    last_change = models.DateTimeField(auto_now=True, db_index=True)
    completing_started_at = models.DateTimeField(blank=True, null=True)

    # Denormalized modified_at for the latest modified transactionItem assigned to
    # checkout
    last_transaction_modified_at = models.DateTimeField(null=True, blank=True)
    automatically_refundable = models.BooleanField(default=False)

    # Tracks the last time automatic checkout completion was attempted
    last_automatic_completion_attempt = models.DateTimeField(null=True, blank=True)

    user = models.ForeignKey(
        settings.AUTH_USER_MODEL,
        blank=True,
        null=True,
        related_name="checkouts",
        on_delete=models.CASCADE,
    )
    email = models.EmailField(blank=True, null=True)
    token = models.UUIDField(primary_key=True, default=uuid4, editable=False)
    channel = models.ForeignKey(
        Channel,
        related_name="checkouts",
        on_delete=models.PROTECT,
    )
    save_billing_address = models.BooleanField(default=True)
    billing_address = models.ForeignKey(
        "account.Address",
        related_name="+",
        editable=False,
        null=True,
        on_delete=models.SET_NULL,
    )
    # do not apply on checkouts with collection point
    save_shipping_address = models.BooleanField(default=True)
    shipping_address = models.ForeignKey(
        "account.Address",
        related_name="+",
        editable=False,
        null=True,
        on_delete=models.SET_NULL,
    )
    shipping_method = models.ForeignKey(
        ShippingMethod,
        blank=True,
        null=True,
        related_name="checkouts",
        on_delete=models.SET_NULL,
    )

    shipping_method_name = models.CharField(
        max_length=255, null=True, default=None, blank=True, editable=False
    )
    external_shipping_method_id = models.CharField(
        max_length=1024, null=True, default=None, blank=True, editable=False
    )

    collection_point = models.ForeignKey(
        "warehouse.Warehouse",
        blank=True,
        null=True,
        related_name="checkouts",
        on_delete=models.SET_NULL,
    )
    note = models.TextField(blank=True, default="")

    currency = models.CharField(
        max_length=settings.DEFAULT_CURRENCY_CODE_LENGTH,
    )
    country = CountryField(default=get_default_country)

    total_net_amount = models.DecimalField(
        max_digits=settings.DEFAULT_MAX_DIGITS,
        decimal_places=settings.DEFAULT_DECIMAL_PLACES,
        default=Decimal(0),
    )
    total_gross_amount = models.DecimalField(
        max_digits=settings.DEFAULT_MAX_DIGITS,
        decimal_places=settings.DEFAULT_DECIMAL_PLACES,
        default=Decimal(0),
    )
    total = TaxedMoneyField(
        net_amount_field="total_net_amount",
        gross_amount_field="total_gross_amount",
    )
    # base price contains only catalogue discounts (does not contains voucher discount)
    base_total_amount = models.DecimalField(
        max_digits=settings.DEFAULT_MAX_DIGITS,
        decimal_places=settings.DEFAULT_DECIMAL_PLACES,
        default=Decimal(0),
    )
    base_total = MoneyField(amount_field="base_total_amount", currency_field="currency")

    subtotal_net_amount = models.DecimalField(
        max_digits=settings.DEFAULT_MAX_DIGITS,
        decimal_places=settings.DEFAULT_DECIMAL_PLACES,
        default=Decimal(0),
    )
    subtotal_gross_amount = models.DecimalField(
        max_digits=settings.DEFAULT_MAX_DIGITS,
        decimal_places=settings.DEFAULT_DECIMAL_PLACES,
        default=Decimal(0),
    )
    subtotal = TaxedMoneyField(
        net_amount_field="subtotal_net_amount",
        gross_amount_field="subtotal_gross_amount",
    )
    # base price contains only catalogue discounts (does not contains voucher discount)
    base_subtotal_amount = models.DecimalField(
        max_digits=settings.DEFAULT_MAX_DIGITS,
        decimal_places=settings.DEFAULT_DECIMAL_PLACES,
        default=Decimal(0),
    )
    base_subtotal = MoneyField(
        amount_field="base_subtotal_amount", currency_field="currency"
    )

    shipping_price_net_amount = models.DecimalField(
        max_digits=settings.DEFAULT_MAX_DIGITS,
        decimal_places=settings.DEFAULT_DECIMAL_PLACES,
        default=Decimal(0),
    )
    shipping_price_gross_amount = models.DecimalField(
        max_digits=settings.DEFAULT_MAX_DIGITS,
        decimal_places=settings.DEFAULT_DECIMAL_PLACES,
        default=Decimal(0),
    )
    shipping_price = TaxedMoneyField(
        net_amount_field="shipping_price_net_amount",
        gross_amount_field="shipping_price_gross_amount",
    )
    shipping_tax_rate = models.DecimalField(
        max_digits=5, decimal_places=4, default=Decimal("0.0")
    )

    undiscounted_base_shipping_price_amount = models.DecimalField(
        max_digits=settings.DEFAULT_MAX_DIGITS,
        decimal_places=settings.DEFAULT_DECIMAL_PLACES,
        default=Decimal(0),
    )
    # Shipping price before applying any discounts
    undiscounted_base_shipping_price = MoneyField(
        amount_field="undiscounted_base_shipping_price_amount",
        currency_field="currency",
    )

    authorize_status = models.CharField(
        max_length=32,
        default=CheckoutAuthorizeStatus.NONE,
        choices=CheckoutAuthorizeStatus.CHOICES,
        db_index=True,
    )

    charge_status = models.CharField(
        max_length=32,
        default=CheckoutChargeStatus.NONE,
        choices=CheckoutChargeStatus.CHOICES,
        db_index=True,
    )

    delivery_methods_stale_at = models.DateTimeField(null=True, blank=True)
    price_expiration = models.DateTimeField(default=timezone.now)
    # Expiration time of the applied discounts.
    # Decides if the discounts are updated before tax recalculation.
    discount_expiration = models.DateTimeField(default=timezone.now)

    assigned_delivery = models.ForeignKey(
        CheckoutDelivery,
        blank=True,
        null=True,
        related_name="+",
        on_delete=models.SET_NULL,
    )

    discount_amount = models.DecimalField(
        max_digits=settings.DEFAULT_MAX_DIGITS,
        decimal_places=settings.DEFAULT_DECIMAL_PLACES,
        default=Decimal("0.0"),
    )
    discount = MoneyField(amount_field="discount_amount", currency_field="currency")
    discount_name = models.CharField(max_length=255, blank=True, null=True)

    translated_discount_name = models.CharField(max_length=255, blank=True, null=True)
    gift_cards = models.ManyToManyField(GiftCard, blank=True, related_name="checkouts")
    voucher_code = models.CharField(max_length=255, blank=True, null=True)

    # The field prevents race condition when two different threads are processing
    # the same checkout with limited usage voucher assigned. Both threads increasing the
    # voucher usage would cause `NotApplicable` error for voucher.
    is_voucher_usage_increased = models.BooleanField(default=False)

    redirect_url = models.URLField(blank=True, null=True)
    tracking_code = models.CharField(max_length=255, blank=True, null=True)

    language_code = models.CharField(
        max_length=35, choices=settings.LANGUAGES, default=settings.LANGUAGE_CODE
    )

    tax_exemption = models.BooleanField(default=False)
    tax_error = models.CharField(
        max_length=TAX_ERROR_FIELD_LENGTH, blank=True, null=True
    )

    search_vector = SearchVectorField(blank=True, null=True)
    search_index_dirty = models.BooleanField(default=True, db_default=True)

    class Meta:
        ordering = ("-last_change", "pk")
        permissions = (
            (CheckoutPermissions.MANAGE_CHECKOUTS.codename, "Manage checkouts"),
            (CheckoutPermissions.HANDLE_CHECKOUTS.codename, "Handle checkouts"),
            (CheckoutPermissions.HANDLE_TAXES.codename, "Handle taxes"),
            (CheckoutPermissions.MANAGE_TAXES.codename, "Manage taxes"),
        )
        indexes = [
            BTreeIndex(
                fields=["last_automatic_completion_attempt"],
                name="automaticcompletionattempt_idx",
            ),
            models.Index(fields=["created_at"], name="idx_checkout_created_at"),
            GinIndex(
                name="checkout_tsearch",
                fields=["search_vector"],
            ),
        ]

    def __iter__(self):
        return iter(self.lines.all())

    def safe_update(self, update_fields: list[str]) -> None:
        """Safely update the checkout instance.

        This method locks the checkout row in the database to prevent concurrent updates.
        In case the checkout does not exist, it raises a CheckoutDoesNotExist exception.

        It prevents the DatabaseError that occurs in case save with update_fields is
        called on a deleted checkout instance.
        """
        from ..core.db.connection import allow_writer

        with allow_writer():
            with transaction.atomic():
                checkout = (
                    Checkout.objects.select_for_update()
                    .filter(pk=self.pk)
                    .only("pk")
                    .first()
                )
                if not checkout:
                    raise Checkout.DoesNotExist(
                        "Checkout does not exist. Unable to update."
                    )
                self.save(update_fields=update_fields)

    def get_customer_email(self) -> str | None:
        if self.email:
            return self.email
        if self.user:
            return self.user.email
        return None

    def is_shipping_required(self) -> bool:
        """Return `True` if any of the lines requires shipping."""
        return any(line.is_shipping_required() for line in self)

    def is_checkout_locked(self) -> bool:
        return bool(
            self.completing_started_at
            and (
                (timezone.now() - self.completing_started_at).seconds
                < settings.CHECKOUT_COMPLETION_LOCK_TIME
            )
        )

    def get_total_gift_cards_balance(
        self, database_connection_name: str = settings.DATABASE_CONNECTION_DEFAULT_NAME
    ) -> Money:
        """Return the total balance of the gift cards assigned to the checkout."""
        balance = (
            self.gift_cards.using(database_connection_name)
            .active(date=datetime.datetime.now(tz=datetime.UTC).date())
            .aggregate(models.Sum("current_balance_amount"))[
                "current_balance_amount__sum"
            ]
        )
        if balance is None:
            return zero_money(currency=self.currency)
        return Money(balance, self.currency)

    def get_line(self, variant: "ProductVariant") -> Optional["CheckoutLine"]:
        """Return a line matching the given variant and data if any."""
        matching_lines = (line for line in self if line.variant.pk == variant.pk)
        return next(matching_lines, None)

    def get_last_active_payment(self) -> Optional["Payment"]:
        payments = [payment for payment in self.payments.all() if payment.is_active]
        return max(payments, default=None, key=attrgetter("pk"))

    def set_country(
        self, country_code: str, commit: bool = False, replace: bool = True
    ):
        """Set country for checkout."""
        if not replace and self.country is not None:
            return
        self.country = Country(country_code)
        if commit:
            self.save(update_fields=["country"])

    def get_country(self):
        address = self.shipping_address or self.billing_address
        saved_country = self.country
        if address is None or not address.country:
            return saved_country.code

        country_code = address.country.code
        if not country_code == saved_country.code:
            self.set_country(country_code, commit=True)
        return country_code


class CheckoutLine(ModelWithMetadata):
    """A single checkout line.

    Multiple lines in the same checkout can refer to the same product variant if
    their `data` field is different.
    """

    id = models.UUIDField(primary_key=True, editable=False, unique=True, default=uuid4)
    old_id = models.PositiveIntegerField(unique=True, null=True, blank=True)
    created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
    checkout = models.ForeignKey(
        Checkout, related_name="lines", on_delete=models.CASCADE
    )
    variant = models.ForeignKey(
        "product.ProductVariant", related_name="+", on_delete=models.CASCADE
    )
    quantity = models.PositiveIntegerField(validators=[MinValueValidator(1)])
    is_gift = models.BooleanField(default=False)
    price_override = models.DecimalField(
        max_digits=settings.DEFAULT_MAX_DIGITS,
        decimal_places=settings.DEFAULT_DECIMAL_PLACES,
        blank=True,
        null=True,
    )
    currency = models.CharField(
        max_length=settings.DEFAULT_CURRENCY_CODE_LENGTH,
    )

    undiscounted_unit_price_amount = models.DecimalField(
        max_digits=settings.DEFAULT_MAX_DIGITS,
        decimal_places=settings.DEFAULT_DECIMAL_PLACES,
        default=Decimal(0),
    )

    undiscounted_unit_price = MoneyField(
        amount_field="undiscounted_unit_price_amount",
        currency_field="currency",
    )

    prior_unit_price_amount = models.DecimalField(
        max_digits=settings.DEFAULT_MAX_DIGITS,
        decimal_places=settings.DEFAULT_DECIMAL_PLACES,
        blank=True,
        null=True,
    )

    prior_unit_price = MoneyField(
        amount_field="prior_unit_price_amount", currency_field="currency"
    )

    total_price_net_amount = models.DecimalField(
        max_digits=settings.DEFAULT_MAX_DIGITS,
        decimal_places=settings.DEFAULT_DECIMAL_PLACES,
        default=Decimal(0),
    )
    total_price_gross_amount = models.DecimalField(
        max_digits=settings.DEFAULT_MAX_DIGITS,
        decimal_places=settings.DEFAULT_DECIMAL_PLACES,
        default=Decimal(0),
    )
    total_price = TaxedMoneyField(
        net_amount_field="total_price_net_amount",
        gross_amount_field="total_price_gross_amount",
    )
    tax_rate = models.DecimalField(
        max_digits=5, decimal_places=4, default=Decimal("0.0")
    )

    class Meta(ModelWithMetadata.Meta):
        ordering = ("created_at", "id")

    def __str__(self):
        return smart_str(self.variant)

    __hash__ = models.Model.__hash__

    def __eq__(self, other):
        if not isinstance(other, CheckoutLine):
            return NotImplemented

        return self.variant == other.variant and self.quantity == other.quantity

    def __ne__(self, other):
        return not self == other  # pragma: no cover

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<CheckoutLine: variant={self.variant!r}, quantity={self.quantity!r}, total={self.total_price_gross_amount} {self.currency}>"

    def __getstate__(self):
        return self.variant, self.quantity

    def __setstate__(self, data):
        self.variant, self.quantity = data

    def is_shipping_required(self) -> bool:
        """Return `True` if the related product variant requires shipping."""
        return self.variant.is_shipping_required()

    checkout = models.OneToOneField(
        Checkout, related_name="metadata_storage", on_delete=models.CASCADE
    )

    16	class SortableModel(models.Model):
    17	    sort_order = models.IntegerField(editable=False, db_index=True, null=True)
    18	
    19	    class Meta:
    20	        abstract = True
    21	
    22	    def get_ordering_queryset(self):
    23	        raise NotImplementedError("Unknown ordering queryset")
    24	
    25	    @staticmethod
    26	    def get_max_sort_order(qs):
    27	        existing_max = qs.aggregate(Max("sort_order"))
    28	        existing_max = existing_max.get("sort_order__max")
    29	        return existing_max
    30	
    31	    def save(self, *args, **kwargs):
    32	        if self.pk is None:
    33	            qs = self.get_ordering_queryset()
    34	            existing_max = self.get_max_sort_order(qs)
    35	            self.sort_order = 0 if existing_max is None else existing_max + 1
    36	        super().save(*args, **kwargs)
    37	
    38	    @transaction.atomic
    39	    def delete(self, *args, **kwargs):
    40	        if self.sort_order is not None:
    41	            qs = self.get_ordering_queryset()
    42	            qs.filter(sort_order__gt=self.sort_order).update(
    43	                sort_order=F("sort_order") - 1
    44	            )
    45	        super().delete(*args, **kwargs)

    55	    line: "CheckoutLine"

    65	    @cached_property
    66	    def variant_discounted_price(self) -> Money:
    67	        """Return the discounted variant price.
    68	
    69	        `variant_discounted_price` means price with the most beneficial applicable
    70	        catalogue promotion.
    71	        If listing is present return the discounted price from the listing,
    72	        if listing is not present, calculate current unit price based on
    73	        `undiscounted_unit_price` and catalogue promotion discounts.
    74	        """
    75	
    76	        # if price_override is set, it takes precedence over any other price for
    77	        # further calculations
    78	        if self.line.price_override is not None:
    79	            return Money(self.line.price_override, self.line.currency)
    80	
    81	        if self.channel_listing and self.channel_listing.discounted_price is not None:
    82	            return self.channel_listing.discounted_price
    83	
    84	        catalogue_discounts = self.get_catalogue_discounts()
    85	        total_price = self.undiscounted_unit_price * self.line.quantity
    86	        for discount in catalogue_discounts:
    87	            total_price -= discount.amount
    88	
    89	        unit_price = max(
    90	            total_price / self.line.quantity, zero_money(self.line.currency)
    91	        )
    92	        return quantize_price(unit_price, self.line.currency)
    93	
    94	    @cached_property
    95	    def undiscounted_unit_price(self) -> Money:
    96	        """Provide undiscounted unit price.
    97

    99	        doesn't have listing, use denormalized price.

   102	            return self.variant.get_base_price(
   103	                self.channel_listing, self.line.price_override
   104	            )
   105	        return self.line.undiscounted_unit_price

   170	def fetch_checkout_lines(

   177	) -> tuple[list[CheckoutLineInfo], list[int]]:
   178	    """Fetch checkout lines as CheckoutLineInfo objects."""
   179	    from ..discount.utils.voucher import attach_voucher_to_line_info

   197	                "variant__attributes__values",
   198	            ]
   199	        )
   200	    lines = checkout.lines.select_related(*select_related_fields).prefetch_related(
   201	        *prefetch_related_fields
   202	    )
   203	    lines_info = []

   205	    product_channel_listing_mapping: dict[int, ProductChannelListing | None] = {}
   206	    channel = checkout.channel
   207	
   208	    for line in lines:
   209	        variant = line.variant
   210	        product = variant.product
   211	        product_type = product.product_type
   212	        collections = list(product.collections.all())
   213	        discounts = list(line.discounts.all())
   214	
   215	        variant_channel_listing = get_variant_channel_listing(

   218	        translation_language_code = checkout.language_code
   219	        rules_info = (
   220	            fetch_variant_rules_info(variant_channel_listing, translation_language_code)
   221	            if not line.is_gift
   222	            else []
   223	        )
   224	
   225	        if not skip_recalculation and not _is_variant_valid(
   226	            checkout, product, variant_channel_listing, product_channel_listing_mapping
   227	        ):
   228	            unavailable_variant_pks.append(variant.pk)
   229	            lines_info.append(
   230	                CheckoutLineInfo(
   231	                    line=line,

   235	                    product_type=product_type,

   238	                    discounts=discounts,
   239	                    rules_info=rules_info,
   240	                    channel=channel,
   241	                    voucher=None,
   242	                    voucher_code=None,
   243	                )
   244	            )
   245	            continue
   246	
   247	        lines_info.append(
   248	            CheckoutLineInfo(
   249	                line=line,
   250	                variant=variant,
   251	                channel_listing=variant_channel_listing,
   252	                product=product,
   253	                product_type=product_type,
   254	                collections=collections,
   255	                tax_class=product.tax_class or product_type.tax_class,
   256	                discounts=discounts,
   257	                rules_info=rules_info,
   258	                channel=channel,
   259	                voucher=None,
   260	                voucher_code=None,
   261	            )
   262	        )
   263	
   264	    if not skip_recalculation and checkout.voucher_code and lines_info:
   265	        if not voucher:
   266	            voucher, _ = get_voucher_for_checkout(
   267	                checkout,
   268	                channel_slug=channel.slug,
   269	                with_prefetch=True,

   272	        if not voucher:

   275	            return lines_info, unavailable_variant_pks
   276	        if voucher.type == VoucherType.SPECIFIC_PRODUCT or voucher.apply_once_per_order:
   277	            voucher_info = fetch_voucher_info(voucher, checkout.voucher_code)
   278	            attach_voucher_to_line_info(voucher_info, lines_info)
   279	    return lines_info, unavailable_variant_pks

   318	    if not _product_channel_listing_is_valid(

   327	def _get_product_channel_listing(
   328	    product_channel_listing_mapping: dict, channel_id: int, product: "Product"
   329	):
   330	    product_channel_listing = product_channel_listing_mapping.get(product.id)
   331	    if product.id not in product_channel_listing_mapping:
   332	        for channel_listing in product.channel_listings.all():
   333	            if channel_listing.channel_id == channel_id:
   334	                product_channel_listing = channel_listing
   335	        product_channel_listing_mapping[product.id] = product_channel_listing
   336	    return product_channel_listing

     1	"""Contains functions which are base for calculating checkout properties.
     2	
     3	It's recommended to use functions from calculations.py module to take in account
     4	plugin manager. Functions from this module return price without
     5	taxes (Money instead of TaxedMoney). If you don't need pre-taxed prices use functions
     6	from calculations.py.
     7	"""
     8	
     9	from typing import TYPE_CHECKING
    10	
    11	from prices import Money
    12	
    13	from ..core.prices import quantize_price
    14	from ..core.taxes import zero_money
    15	from ..discount import VoucherType
    16	
    17	if TYPE_CHECKING:
    18	    from ..channel.models import Channel
    19	    from .delivery_context import ShippingMethodInfo
    20	    from .fetch import CheckoutInfo, CheckoutLineInfo
    21	
    22	
    23	def calculate_base_line_unit_price(
    24	    line_info: "CheckoutLineInfo",
    25	) -> Money:
    26	    """Calculate line unit price including discounts and vouchers.
    27	
    28	    The price includes catalogue promotions, specific product and applied once per order
    29	    voucher discounts.
    30	    The price does not include the entire order discount.
    31	    """
    32	    total_line_price = calculate_base_line_total_price(line_info=line_info)
    33	    quantity = line_info.line.quantity
    34	    currency = total_line_price.currency
    35	    return quantize_price(total_line_price / quantity, currency)
    36	
    37	
    38	def calculate_base_line_total_price(
    39	    line_info: "CheckoutLineInfo",
    40	    include_voucher: bool = True,
    41	) -> Money:
    42	    """Calculate line total price including discounts and vouchers.
    43	
    44	    The price includes catalogue promotions, specific product and applied once per order
    45	    voucher discounts.
    46	    The price does not include order promotions and the entire order vouchers.
    47	    When the line is gift reward, the price is zero.
    48	    """
    49	    from ..discount.utils.voucher import calculate_line_discount_amount_from_voucher
    50	
    51	    variant_price = line_info.undiscounted_unit_price
    52	
    53	    total_price = variant_price * line_info.line.quantity
    54	
    55	    for discount in line_info.discounts:
    56	        discount_amount = Money(discount.amount_value, line_info.line.currency)
    57	        total_price -= discount_amount
    58	
    59	    if include_voucher and line_info.voucher:
    60	        discount_amount = calculate_line_discount_amount_from_voucher(
    61	            line_info, total_price
    62	        )
    63	        total_price -= discount_amount
    64	
    65	    return quantize_price(total_price, total_price.currency)

    89	def base_checkout_delivery_price(
    90	    checkout_info: "CheckoutInfo",
    91	    lines: list["CheckoutLineInfo"] | None = None,
    92	    include_voucher: bool = True,
    93	) -> Money:
    94	    """Calculate base (untaxed) price for any kind of delivery method."""
    95	    currency = checkout_info.checkout.currency
    96	
    97	    shipping_price = base_checkout_undiscounted_delivery_price(checkout_info, lines)
    98	
    99	    is_shipping_voucher = (
   100	        checkout_info.voucher.type == VoucherType.SHIPPING
   101	        if include_voucher and checkout_info.voucher
   102	        else False
   103	    )
   104	
   105	    if is_shipping_voucher:
   106	        discount = checkout_info.checkout.discount
   107	        shipping_price = max(zero_money(currency), shipping_price - discount)
   108	
   109	    return quantize_price(
   110	        shipping_price,
   111	        currency,
   112	    )

   115	def base_checkout_undiscounted_delivery_price(
   116	    checkout_info: "CheckoutInfo",
   117	    lines: list["CheckoutLineInfo"] | None = None,
   118	) -> Money:
   119	    """Calculate base (untaxed) undiscounted price for any kind of delivery method."""
   120	    from .delivery_context import ShippingMethodInfo
   121	
   122	    delivery_method_info = checkout_info.get_delivery_method_info()
   123	    currency = checkout_info.checkout.currency
   124	
   125	    if not isinstance(delivery_method_info, ShippingMethodInfo):
   126	        return zero_money(currency)
   127	
   128	    return calculate_base_price_for_shipping_method(
   129	        checkout_info, delivery_method_info, lines
   130	    )

   133	def calculate_base_price_for_shipping_method(
   134	    checkout_info: "CheckoutInfo",
   135	    shipping_method_info: "ShippingMethodInfo",
   136	    lines: list["CheckoutLineInfo"] | None = None,
   137	) -> Money:
   138	    """Return checkout shipping price."""
   139	    from .fetch import CheckoutLineInfo
   140	
   141	    shipping_method = shipping_method_info.delivery_method
   142	
   143	    if lines is not None and all(isinstance(line, CheckoutLineInfo) for line in lines):
   144	        from .delivery_context import is_shipping_required
   145	
   146	        shipping_required = is_shipping_required(lines)
   147	    else:
   148	        shipping_required = checkout_info.checkout.is_shipping_required()
   149	
   150	    if not shipping_method or not shipping_required:
   151	        return zero_money(checkout_info.checkout.currency)
   152	
   153	    return quantize_price(
   154	        shipping_method.price,
   155	        checkout_info.checkout.currency,
   156	    )

   159	def base_checkout_total(
   160	    checkout_info: "CheckoutInfo",
   161	    lines: list["CheckoutLineInfo"],
   162	) -> Money:
   163	    """Return the total cost of the checkout.
   164	
   165	    The price includes catalogue promotions, shipping, specific product
   166	    and applied once per order voucher discounts.
   167	    The price does not include order promotions and the entire order vouchers.
   168	    """
   169	    currency = checkout_info.checkout.currency
   170	    subtotal = base_checkout_subtotal(lines, checkout_info.channel, currency)
   171	    shipping_price = base_checkout_delivery_price(checkout_info, lines)
   172	
   173	    return subtotal + shipping_price
   174	
   175	
   176	def base_checkout_subtotal(
   177	    checkout_lines: list["CheckoutLineInfo"],
   178	    channel: "Channel",
   179	    currency: str,
   180	    include_voucher: bool = True,
   181	) -> Money:
   182	    """Return the checkout subtotal value.
   183	
   184	    The price includes catalogue promotions, specific product and applied once per order
   185	    voucher discounts.
   186	    The price does not include order promotions and the entire order vouchers.
   187	    """
   188	    line_totals = [
   189	        calculate_base_line_total_price(
   190	            line,
   191	            include_voucher=include_voucher,
   192	        )
   193	        for line in checkout_lines
   194	    ]
   195	
   196	    return sum(line_totals, zero_money(currency))
   197	
   198	
   199	def checkout_total(
   200	    checkout_info: "CheckoutInfo",
   201	    lines: list["CheckoutLineInfo"],
   202	) -> Money:
   203	    """Return the total cost of the checkout including discounts and vouchers.
   204	
   205	    It should be used as a based value when no flat rate/tax plugin/tax app is active.
   206	    """
   207	    from ..discount.utils.voucher import is_order_level_voucher
   208	
   209	    currency = checkout_info.checkout.currency
   210	    subtotal = base_checkout_subtotal(lines, checkout_info.channel, currency)
   211	    shipping_price = base_checkout_delivery_price(checkout_info, lines)
   212	    discount = checkout_info.checkout.discount
   213	
   214	    # order promotion discount and entire_order voucher discount with
   215	    # apply_once_per_order set to False are not included in the total price yet
   216	    discounted_object_promotion = bool(checkout_info.discounts)
   217	    discount_not_included = discounted_object_promotion or is_order_level_voucher(
   218	        checkout_info.voucher
   219	    )
   220	    # Discount is subtracted from both gross and net values, which may cause negative
   221	    # net value if we are having a discount that covers whole price.
   222	    if discount_not_included:
   223	        subtotal = max(zero_money(currency), subtotal - discount)
   224	    return subtotal + shipping_price
   225

   227	def get_line_total_price_with_propagated_checkout_discount(
   228	    checkout_info: "CheckoutInfo",
   229	    lines: list["CheckoutLineInfo"],
   230	    checkout_line_info: "CheckoutLineInfo",
   231	) -> Money:
   232	    """Calculate the checkout line price with discounts.
   233	
   234	    Include the entire order voucher discount or discount from order
   235	    promotion (this discount is applied only when voucher code is not set).
   236	    The discount amount is calculated for every line proportionally to
   237	    the rate of total line price to checkout total price.
   238	    """
   239	    voucher = checkout_info.voucher
   240	    base_total_price = calculate_base_line_total_price(
   241	        checkout_line_info,
   242	    )
   243	    if voucher and (
   244	        voucher.apply_once_per_order
   245	        or voucher.type in [VoucherType.SHIPPING, VoucherType.SPECIFIC_PRODUCT]
   246	    ):
   247	        return base_total_price
   248	
   249	    if not voucher and not checkout_info.discounts:
   250	        return base_total_price
   251	
   252	    total_discount = checkout_info.checkout.discount
   253	    for (
   254	        checkout_line,
   255	        total_price,
   256	    ) in _propagate_checkout_discount_on_checkout_lines_prices(
   257	        lines, total_discount, checkout_info.channel.currency_code
   258	    ):
   259	        if checkout_line_info.line.id == checkout_line.id:
   260	            return total_price
   250	    checkout_info: "CheckoutInfo",
   251	    lines: list["CheckoutLineInfo"],
   252	    checkout_line_info: "CheckoutLineInfo",
   253	    database_connection_name: str = settings.DATABASE_CONNECTION_DEFAULT_NAME,
   254	    allow_sync_webhooks: bool = True,
   255	) -> Decimal:
   256	    """Return the tax rate of provided line.
   257	
   258	    It takes in account all plugins.
   259	    """
   260	    _, lines = fetch_checkout_data(
   261	        checkout_info,
   262	        manager=manager,
   263	        lines=lines,
   264	        database_connection_name=database_connection_name,
   265	        allow_sync_webhooks=allow_sync_webhooks,
   266	        requestor=None,
   267	    ).get()
   268	    checkout_line_info = find_checkout_line_info(lines, checkout_line_info.line.id)
   269	    return checkout_line_info.line.tax_rate
   270

   272	def checkout_line_undiscounted_unit_price(
   273	    *,
   274	    checkout_info: "CheckoutInfo",
   275	    checkout_line_info: "CheckoutLineInfo",
   276	):
   277	    # Fetch the undiscounted unit price from channel listings in case the prices
   278	    # are invalidated.
   279	    if checkout_info.checkout.price_expiration < timezone.now():
   280	        return base_calculations.calculate_undiscounted_base_line_unit_price(
   281	            checkout_line_info, checkout_info.channel
   282	        )
   283	    currency = checkout_info.checkout.currency
   284	    return quantize_price(checkout_line_info.line.undiscounted_unit_price, currency)

   288	    *,

   299	def update_undiscounted_unit_price_for_lines(lines: Iterable["CheckoutLineInfo"]):
   300	    """Update line undiscounted unit price amount.
   301	
   302	    Undiscounted unit price stores the denormalized price of the variant.
   303	    """
   304	    for line_info in lines:
   305	        if not line_info.channel_listing or line_info.channel_listing.price is None:
   306	            continue
   307	
   308	        line_info.line.undiscounted_unit_price = line_info.undiscounted_unit_price
   309

   311	def update_prior_unit_price_for_lines(lines: Iterable["CheckoutLineInfo"]):
   312	    """Update line prior unit price amount.
   313	
   314	    Prior unit price stores the price of the variant before promotion.
   315	    """
   316	    for line_info in lines:
   317	        listing = line_info.channel_listing
   318	        if not listing:
   319	            continue
   320	
   321	        # Updating amount instead of Money to avoid overriding currency with None
   322	        if listing.prior_price_amount is None:
   323	            line_info.line.prior_unit_price_amount = None
   324	        else:
   325	            line_info.line.prior_unit_price_amount = line_info.prior_unit_price_amount

   328	@allow_writer()
   329	def promise_calculate_taxes_with_error_handling(
   330	    tax_calculation_strategy: str,
   331	    tax_app_identifier: str | None,
   332	    manager: "PluginsManager",
   333	    checkout_info: "CheckoutInfo",
   334	    lines: list["CheckoutLineInfo"],
   335	    prices_entered_with_tax: bool,
   336	    requestor: Union["App", "User", None],
   337	    database_connection_name: str,
   338	) -> Promise[None]:
   339	    from .utils import checkout_info_for_logs
   340	
   341	    checkout = checkout_info.checkout
   342	
   343	    @allow_writer_for_default_connection(database_connection_name)
   344	    def process_error(e: Exception):
   345	        if not isinstance(e, TaxDataError):
   346	            raise e
   347	        if str(e) != TaxDataErrorMessage.EMPTY:
   348	            extra = checkout_info_for_logs(checkout_info, lines)
   349	            if getattr(e, "errors", None):
   350	                extra["errors"] = e.errors
   351	            logger.warning(str(e), extra=extra)
   352	        _set_checkout_base_prices(checkout, checkout_info, lines)
   353	        checkout.tax_error = str(e)
   354	
   355	    return _calculate_and_add_tax(
   356	        tax_calculation_strategy=tax_calculation_strategy,
   357	        tax_app_identifier=tax_app_identifier,
   358	        checkout_info=checkout_info,
   359	        lines=lines,
   360	        manager=manager,
   361	        prices_entered_with_tax=prices_entered_with_tax,
   362	        requestor=requestor,
   363	        database_connection_name=database_connection_name,
   364	    ).catch(process_error)

   366	
   367	def _fetch_checkout_prices_if_expired(
   368	    checkout_info: "CheckoutInfo",
   369	    manager: "PluginsManager",
   370	    lines: list["CheckoutLineInfo"],
   371	    allow_sync_webhooks: bool,
   372	    requestor: Union["App", "User", None],
   373	    force_update: bool = False,
   374	    database_connection_name: str = settings.DATABASE_CONNECTION_DEFAULT_NAME,
   375	) -> Promise[tuple["CheckoutInfo", list["CheckoutLineInfo"]]]:
   376	    """Fetch checkout prices with taxes.
   377	
   378	    First calculate and apply all checkout prices with taxes separately,
   379	    then apply tax data as well if we receive one.
   380	
   381	    Prices can be updated only if force_update == True, or if time elapsed from the
   382	    last price update is greater than settings.CHECKOUT_PRICES_TTL.
   383	    """
   384	    checkout = checkout_info.checkout
   385	
   386	    if not force_update and checkout.price_expiration > timezone.now():
   387	        return Promise.resolve((checkout_info, lines))
   388	
   389	    tax_configuration = checkout_info.tax_configuration
   390	    with allow_writer_for_default_connection(database_connection_name):
   391	        tax_calculation_strategy = get_tax_calculation_strategy_for_checkout(
   392	            checkout_info, database_connection_name=database_connection_name
   393	        )
   394	
   395	        if (
   396	            tax_calculation_strategy == TaxCalculationStrategy.TAX_APP
   397	            and not allow_sync_webhooks
   398	        ):
   399	            return Promise.resolve((checkout_info, lines))
   400	
   401	        prices_entered_with_tax = tax_configuration.prices_entered_with_tax
   402	        charge_taxes = get_charge_taxes_for_checkout(
   403	            checkout_info, database_connection_name=database_connection_name
   404	        )
   405	        should_charge_tax = charge_taxes and not checkout.tax_exemption
   406	        tax_app_identifier = get_tax_app_identifier_for_checkout(
   407	            checkout_info, database_connection_name
   408	        )
   409	
   410	        try:
   411	            recalculate_discounts(
   412	                checkout_info,
   413	                lines,
   414	                database_connection_name=database_connection_name,
   415	                force_update=force_update,
   416	            )
   417	        except Checkout.DoesNotExist:
   418	            # Checkout was removed or converted to a order. Return data without saving.
   419	            return Promise.resolve((checkout_info, lines))
   420	
   421	    checkout.tax_error = None
   422	
   423	    def remove_tax_if_needed(_):
   424	        if should_charge_tax:
   425	            return
   426	        # If charge_taxes is disabled or checkout is exempt from taxes, remove the
   427	        # tax from the original gross prices.
   428	        _remove_tax(checkout, lines)
   429	        return
   430	
   431	    def process_calculation_result(_):
   432	        price_expiration = timezone.now() + settings.CHECKOUT_PRICES_TTL
   433	        checkout.price_expiration = price_expiration
   434	        checkout.discount_expiration = price_expiration
   435	
   436	        with allow_writer():
   437	            with transaction.atomic():
   438	                try:
   439	                    locked_checkout = (
   440	                        checkout_qs_select_for_update()
   441	                        .only("last_change")
   442	                        .get(token=checkout.token)
   443	                    )
   444	                except Checkout.DoesNotExist:
   445	                    # Checkout was removed or converted to a order. Return data without saving.
   446	                    return checkout_info, lines
   447	
   448	                # Check whether the checkout has been modified during the recalculation process by another process.
   449	                # If so, we should skip saving. The same applies if the checkout has been removed. This is important
   450	                # to avoid overwriting changes made by the other requests. Skipping the save function does not affect
   451	                # the query response because it returns the adjusted checkout and line info objects.
   452	                if checkout.last_change == locked_checkout.last_change:
   453	                    checkout_update_fields = [
   454	                        "voucher_code",
   455	                        "total_net_amount",
   456	                        "total_gross_amount",
   457	                        "subtotal_net_amount",
   458	                        "subtotal_gross_amount",
   459	                        "shipping_price_net_amount",
   460	                        "shipping_price_gross_amount",
   461	                        "undiscounted_base_shipping_price_amount",
   462	                        "shipping_tax_rate",
   463	                        "translated_discount_name",
   464	                        "discount_amount",
   465	                        "discount_name",
   466	                        "currency",
   467	                        "price_expiration",
   468	                        "discount_expiration",
   469	                        "tax_error",
   470	                    ]
   471	
   472	                    from .utils import checkout_lines_bulk_update
   473	
   474	                    checkout.save(
   475	                        update_fields=checkout_update_fields,
   476	                        using=settings.DATABASE_CONNECTION_DEFAULT_NAME,
   477	                    )
   478	                    checkout_lines_bulk_update(
   479	                        [line_info.line for line_info in lines],
   480	                        [
   481	                            "total_price_net_amount",
   482	                            "total_price_gross_amount",
   483	                            "tax_rate",
   484	                            "undiscounted_unit_price_amount",
   485	                            "prior_unit_price_amount",
   486	                        ],
   487	                    )
   488	                return checkout_info, lines
   489	
   490	    no_need_to_calculate_taxes = not prices_entered_with_tax and not should_charge_tax
   491	    if no_need_to_calculate_taxes:
   492	        # Calculate net prices without taxes.
   493	        _set_checkout_base_prices(checkout, checkout_info, lines)
   494	        return Promise.resolve(None).then(process_calculation_result)
   495	
   496	    return (
   497	        promise_calculate_taxes_with_error_handling(
   498	            tax_calculation_strategy=tax_calculation_strategy,
   499	            tax_app_identifier=tax_app_identifier,
   500	            manager=manager,
   501	            checkout_info=checkout_info,
   502	            lines=lines,
   503	            prices_entered_with_tax=prices_entered_with_tax,
   504	            requestor=requestor,
   505	            database_connection_name=database_connection_name,
   506	        )
   507	        .then(remove_tax_if_needed)
   508	        .then(process_calculation_result)
   509	    )
   510	
   511	
   512	@allow_writer()
   513	def recalculate_discounts(
   514	    checkout_info: "CheckoutInfo",
   515	    lines_info: Iterable["CheckoutLineInfo"],
   516	    database_connection_name: str = settings.DATABASE_CONNECTION_DEFAULT_NAME,
   517	    force_update: bool = False,
   518	) -> tuple["CheckoutInfo", Iterable["CheckoutLineInfo"]]:
   519	    """Recalculate checkout discounts.
   520	
   521	    Discounts are recalculated only if force_update is True, or if both discount
   522	    and price expirations have passed.
   523	    This updates catalogue promotions, vouchers, and order promotion discounts.
   524	    """
   525	    checkout = checkout_info.checkout
   526	
   527	    # Do not recalculate discounts in case the checkout prices are still valid, either
   528	    # discounts or tax prices.
   529	    if not force_update and (
   530	        checkout.discount_expiration > timezone.now()
   531	        or checkout.price_expiration > timezone.now()
   532	    ):
   533	        return checkout_info, lines_info
   534	
   535	    lines = cast(list, lines_info)
   536	    update_undiscounted_unit_price_for_lines(lines)
   537	    update_prior_unit_price_for_lines(lines)
   538	
   539	    soonest_promotion_end_date = (
   540	        create_or_update_discount_objects_from_promotion_for_checkout(
   541	            checkout_info, lines, database_connection_name
   542	        )
   543	    )
   544	
   545	    if soonest_promotion_end_date is not None:
   546	        checkout.discount_expiration = min(
   547	            soonest_promotion_end_date, timezone.now() + settings.CHECKOUT_PRICES_TTL
   548	        )
   549	    else:
   550	        checkout.discount_expiration = timezone.now() + settings.CHECKOUT_PRICES_TTL
   551	
   552	    checkout.safe_update(
   553	        update_fields=["discount_expiration"],
   554	    )
   555	
   556	    return checkout_info, lines
   557	
   558	
   559	@allow_writer()
   560	def _calculate_and_add_tax(
   561	    tax_calculation_strategy: str,
   562	    tax_app_identifier: str | None,
   563	    manager: "PluginsManager",
   564	    checkout_info: "CheckoutInfo",
   565	    lines: list["CheckoutLineInfo"],
   566	    prices_entered_with_tax: bool,
   567	    requestor: Union["App", "User", None],
   568	    database_connection_name: str = settings.DATABASE_CONNECTION_DEFAULT_NAME,
   569	):
   570	    checkout = checkout_info.checkout
   571	
   572	    @allow_writer_for_default_connection(database_connection_name)
   573	    def process_flat_taxes(_):
   574	        # Get taxes calculated with flat rates and apply to checkout.
   575	        update_checkout_prices_with_flat_rates(
   576	            checkout,
   577	            checkout_info,
   578	            lines,
   579	            prices_entered_with_tax,
   580	            database_connection_name=database_connection_name,
   581	        )
   582	
   583	    if tax_calculation_strategy == TaxCalculationStrategy.FLAT_RATES:
   584	        return Promise.resolve(None).then(process_flat_taxes)
   585	
   586	    if tax_app_identifier:
   587	        return _call_plugin_or_tax_app(
   588	            tax_app_identifier=tax_app_identifier,
   589	            manager=manager,
   590	            checkout_info=checkout_info,
   591	            lines=lines,
   592	            requestor=requestor,
   593	        )
   594	
   595	    # Deprecated flow when no tax app identifier is provided.
   596	    def recalculate_with_tax_app_data(tax_data: TaxData | None):
   597	        _apply_tax_data(checkout, lines, tax_data)
   598	
   599	    # Call the tax plugins.
   600	    _apply_tax_data_from_plugins(checkout, manager, checkout_info, lines)
   601	
   602	    # If taxAppId is not configured run all active plugins and tax apps.
   603	    # If taxAppId is provided run tax plugin or Tax App. taxAppId can be
   604	    # configured with Avatax plugin identifier.
   605	    return _get_promised_taxes_for_checkout(
   606	        checkout_info=checkout_info,
   607	        lines=lines,
   608	        tax_app_identifier=tax_app_identifier,
   609	        requestor=requestor,
   610	        allowed_empty_tax_data=True,
   611	    ).then(recalculate_with_tax_app_data)
   612	
   613	
   614	def _call_plugin_or_tax_app(
   615	    tax_app_identifier: str,
   616	    manager: "PluginsManager",
   617	    checkout_info: "CheckoutInfo",
   618	    lines: list["CheckoutLineInfo"],
   619	    requestor: Union["App", "User", None],
   620	) -> Promise[None]:
   621	    checkout = checkout_info.checkout
   622

   210	def determine_order_status(
   211	    total_quantity: int,
   212	    quantity_fulfilled: int,
   213	    quantity_returned: int,
   214	    quantity_awaiting_approval: int,
   215	):
   216	    if quantity_fulfilled - quantity_awaiting_approval <= 0:
   217	        status = OrderStatus.UNFULFILLED
   218	    elif 0 < quantity_returned < total_quantity:
   219	        status = OrderStatus.PARTIALLY_RETURNED
   220	    elif quantity_returned == total_quantity:
   221	        status = OrderStatus.RETURNED
   222	    elif quantity_fulfilled - quantity_awaiting_approval < total_quantity:
   223	        status = OrderStatus.PARTIALLY_FULFILLED
   224	    else:
   225	        status = OrderStatus.FULFILLED
   226	    return status

   304	    if line_data.quantity_to_update:
   305	        quantity = line_data.quantity
   306	        if quantity > 0:
   307	            if replace:

   309	            else:
   310	                line.quantity += quantity

   312	    if line_data.custom_price_to_update:

   314	            line.price_override = line_data.custom_price
   315	            to_update.append(line)

   348	            checkout_line.store_value_in_metadata(

   563	                                    - reserved_quantity,
   564	                                    global_quantity_limit_per_checkout or sys.maxsize,
   565	                                ),

   684	    @staticmethod
   685	    def resolve_pricing(
   686	        root: ChannelContext[models.ProductVariant], info, *, address=None
   687	    ):
   688	        if not root.channel_slug:
   689	            return None
   690	
   691	        channel_slug = str(root.channel_slug)
   692	        context = info.context
   693	
   694	        product_channel_listing = ProductChannelListingByProductIdAndChannelSlugLoader(
   695	            context

   697	        variant_channel_listing = VariantChannelListingByVariantIdAndChannelSlugLoader(
   698	            context

   700	        channel = ChannelBySlugLoader(context).load(channel_slug)
   701	        tax_class_id_loader = TaxClassIdByProductIdLoader(context).load(
   702	            root.node.product_id

   704	
   705	        def load_tax_configuration(data):
   706	            (
   707	                product_channel_listing,
   708	                variant_channel_listing,
   709	                channel,
   710	                tax_class_id,
   711	            ) = data
   712	
   713	            if not variant_channel_listing or not product_channel_listing:
   714	                return None
   715	            country_code = get_active_country(channel, address_data=address)
   716	
   717	            def load_tax_country_exceptions(tax_config):
   718	                def load_default_tax_rate(tax_configs_per_country):
   719	                    def calculate_pricing_info(data):
   720	                        country_rates, default_country_rate_obj = data
   721	
   722	                        tax_config_country = next(
   723	                            (
   724	                                tc
   725	                                for tc in tax_configs_per_country
   726	                                if tc.country.code == country_code
   727	                            ),
   728	                            None,
   729	                        )
   730	                        tax_calculation_strategy = get_tax_calculation_strategy(
   731	                            tax_config, tax_config_country
   732	                        )
   733	
   734	                        default_tax_rate = (
   735	                            default_country_rate_obj.rate
   736	                            if default_country_rate_obj
   737	                            else Decimal(0)
   738	                        )
   739	                        tax_rate = get_tax_rate_for_country(
   740	                            country_rates, default_tax_rate, country_code
   741	                        )
   742	
   743	                        availability = get_variant_availability(
   744	                            variant_channel_listing=variant_channel_listing,
   745	                            product_channel_listing=product_channel_listing,
   746	                            prices_entered_with_tax=tax_config.prices_entered_with_tax,
   747	                            tax_calculation_strategy=tax_calculation_strategy,
   748	                            tax_rate=tax_rate,
   749	                        )
   750	                        return (
   751	                            VariantPricingInfo(**asdict(availability))
   752	                            if availability
   753	                            else None
   754	                        )
   755	
   756	                    country_rates = (
   757	                        TaxClassCountryRateByTaxClassIDLoader(context).load(
   758	                            tax_class_id
   759	                        )
   760	                        if tax_class_id
   761	                        else Promise.resolve([])
   762	                    )
   763	                    default_rate = TaxClassDefaultRateByCountryLoader(context).load(
   764	                        country_code
   765	                    )
   766	                    return Promise.all([country_rates, default_rate]).then(
   767	                        calculate_pricing_info
   768	                    )
   769	
   770	                return (
   771	                    TaxConfigurationPerCountryByTaxConfigurationIDLoader(context)
   772	                    .load(tax_config.id)
   773	                    .then(load_default_tax_rate)
   774	                )
   775	
   776	            return (
   777	                TaxConfigurationByChannelId(context)
   778	                .load(channel.id)
   779	                .then(load_tax_country_exceptions)
   780	            )

   782	        return Promise.all(
   783	            [
   784	                product_channel_listing,
   785	                variant_channel_listing,
   786	                channel,
   787	                tax_class_id_loader,
   788	            ]
   789	        ).then(load_tax_configuration)

   527	                global_availability -= listings_reservations[channel_listing.id]
   528	
   529	            global_availability = max(global_availability, 0)
   530	
   531	            if quantity > global_availability:
   532	                insufficient_stocks.append(
   533	                    InsufficientStockData(
   534	                        variant=variant,
   535	                        available_quantity=global_availability,
   536	                    )
   537	                )
   538	
   539	    if insufficient_stocks:
   540	        raise InsufficientStock(insufficient_stocks)

   605	    result = (
   606	        Reservation.objects.filter(
   607	            stock__in=stocks,
   608	        )
   609	        .not_expired()
   610	        .exclude_checkout_lines(checkout_lines)

   613	            quantity_reserved=Coalesce(Sum("quantity_reserved"), 0),
   614	        )

   619	        variant_id = stocks_variants.get(stock_reservations["stock_id"])
   620	        if variant_id:
   621	            reservations[variant_id] += stock_reservations["quantity_reserved"]
   622	
   623	    return reservations

    28	@traced_atomic_transaction()
    29	def reserve_stocks_and_preorders(
    30	    checkout_lines: Iterable["CheckoutLine"],
    31	    lines_to_update_reservation_time: Iterable["CheckoutLine"],
    32	    variants: Iterable["ProductVariant"],
    33	    country_code: str,
    34	    channel: "Channel",
    35	    length_in_minutes: int,
    36	    *,
    37	    calculate_stocks_with_shipping_zones: bool,
    38	    replace: bool = True,
    39	):
    40	    stock_variants, stock_lines = [], []
    41	    preorder_variants, preorder_lines = [], []
    42	
    43	    for variant in variants:
    44	        if variant.is_preorder_active():
    45	            preorder_variants.append(variant)
    46	        else:
    47	            stock_variants.append(variant)
    48	
    49	    for line in checkout_lines:
    50	        if line.variant.is_preorder_active():
    51	            preorder_lines.append(line)
    52	        else:
    53	            stock_lines.append(line)
    54	
    55	    reserved_until = timezone.now() + datetime.timedelta(minutes=length_in_minutes)
    56	
    57	    if stock_lines:
    58	        reserve_stocks(
    59	            stock_lines,
    60	            stock_variants,
    61	            country_code,
    62	            channel,
    63	            reserved_until,
    64	            replace=replace,
    65	            calculate_stocks_with_shipping_zones=calculate_stocks_with_shipping_zones,
    66	        )
    67	
    68	        # Refresh reserved_until for already existing lines
    69	        if lines_to_update_reservation_time:
    70	            Reservation.objects.filter(
    71	                checkout_line__in=lines_to_update_reservation_time
    72	            ).update(reserved_until=reserved_until)
    73	
    74	    if preorder_lines:
    75	        reserve_preorders(
    76	            preorder_lines,
    77	            preorder_variants,
    78	            country_code,
    79	            channel.slug,
    80	            reserved_until,
    81	            replace=replace,
    82	        )
    83	
    84	        # Refresh reserved_until for already existing lines
    85	        if lines_to_update_reservation_time:
    86	            PreorderReservation.objects.filter(
    87	                checkout_line__in=lines_to_update_reservation_time
    88	            ).update(reserved_until=reserved_until)
