    91	def reserve_stocks(
    92	    checkout_lines: Iterable["CheckoutLine"],
    93	    variants: Iterable["ProductVariant"],
    94	    country_code: str,
    95	    channel: "Channel",
    96	    reserved_until: datetime.datetime,
    97	    *,
    98	    replace: bool = True,
    99	    calculate_stocks_with_shipping_zones: bool,
   100	):
   101	    """Reserve stocks for given `checkout_lines` in given country."""
   102	    variants_ids = [line.variant_id for line in checkout_lines]
   103	    variants = [variant for variant in variants if variant.pk in variants_ids]
   104	    variants_map = {variant.id: variant for variant in variants}
   105	
   106	    # Reservation is only applied to checkout lines with variants with track inventory
   107	    # set to True
   108	    checkout_lines = get_checkout_lines_to_reserve(checkout_lines, variants_map)
   109	    if not checkout_lines:
   110	        return
   111	
   112	    stocks = list(
   113	        stock_qs_select_for_update()
   114	        .get_variants_stocks(
   115	            channel.slug,
   116	            variants,
   117	            country_code=country_code,
   118	            include_shipping_zones=calculate_stocks_with_shipping_zones,
   119	        )
   120	        .order_by("pk")
   121	        .values("id", "product_variant", "pk", "quantity", "warehouse_id")
   122	    )
   123	    stocks_id = [stock.pop("id") for stock in stocks]
   124	
   125	    quantity_allocation_list = list(
   126	        Allocation.objects.filter(
   127	            stock_id__in=stocks_id,
   128	            quantity_allocated__gt=0,
   129	        )
   130	        .values("stock")
   131	        .annotate(quantity_allocated_sum=Sum("quantity_allocated"))
   132	    )
   133	    quantity_allocation_for_stocks: dict = defaultdict(int)
   134	    for allocation in quantity_allocation_list:
   135	        quantity_allocation_for_stocks[allocation["stock"]] += allocation[
   136	            "quantity_allocated_sum"
   137	        ]
   138	
   139	    quantity_reservation_list = list(
   140	        Reservation.objects.filter(
   141	            stock_id__in=stocks_id,
   142	            quantity_reserved__gt=0,
   143	        )
   144	        .not_expired()
   145	        .exclude_checkout_lines(checkout_lines)
   146	        .values("stock")
   147	        .annotate(quantity_reserved_sum=Sum("quantity_reserved"))
   148	    )
   149	    quantity_reservation_for_stocks: dict = defaultdict(int)
   150	    for reservation in quantity_reservation_list:
   151	        quantity_reservation_for_stocks[reservation["stock"]] += reservation[
   152	            "quantity_reserved_sum"
   153	        ]
   154	
   155	    stocks = sort_stocks(
   156	        channel.allocation_strategy,
   157	        stocks,
   158	        channel,
   159	        quantity_allocation_for_stocks,
   160	    )
   161	
   162	    variant_to_stocks: dict[int, list[StockData]] = defaultdict(list)
   163	    for stock_data in stocks:
   164	        variant = stock_data.pop("product_variant")
   165	        variant_to_stocks[variant].append(StockData(**stock_data))
   166	
   167	    insufficient_stocks: list[InsufficientStockData] = []
   168	    reservations: list[Reservation] = []
   169	    for line in checkout_lines:
   170	        stock_reservations = variant_to_stocks[line.variant_id]
   171	        insufficient_stocks, reserved_items = _create_stock_reservations(
   172	            line,
   173	            variants_map[line.variant_id],
   174	            stock_reservations,
   175	            quantity_allocation_for_stocks,
   176	            quantity_reservation_for_stocks,
   177	            insufficient_stocks,
   178	            reserved_until,
   179	        )
   180	        reservations.extend(reserved_items)
   181	
   182	    if insufficient_stocks:
   183	        raise InsufficientStock(insufficient_stocks)
   184	
   185	    if reservations:
   186	        if replace:
   187	            Reservation.objects.filter(checkout_line__in=checkout_lines).delete()
   188	        Reservation.objects.bulk_create(reservations)
   189	
   190	
   191	def _create_stock_reservations(
   192	    line: "CheckoutLine",
   193	    variant: "ProductVariant",
   194	    stocks: list[StockData],
   195	    quantity_allocation_for_stocks: dict,
   196	    quantity_reservation_for_stocks: dict,
   197	    insufficient_stocks: list[InsufficientStockData],
   198	    reserved_until: datetime.datetime,
   199	) -> tuple[list[InsufficientStockData], list[Reservation]]:
   200	    quantity = line.quantity
   201	    quantity_reserved = 0
   202	    reservations = []
   203	    for stock_data in stocks:
   204	        quantity_allocated_in_stock = quantity_allocation_for_stocks.get(
   205	            stock_data.pk, 0
   206	        )
   207	        quantity_reserved_in_stock = quantity_reservation_for_stocks.get(
   208	            stock_data.pk, 0
   209	        )
   210	
   211	        quantity_available_in_stock = max(
   212	            stock_data.quantity
   213	            - quantity_allocated_in_stock
   214	            - quantity_reserved_in_stock,
   215	            0,
   216	        )
   217	
   218	        quantity_to_reserve = min(
   219	            (quantity - quantity_reserved), quantity_available_in_stock
   220	        )
   221	        if quantity_to_reserve > 0:
   222	            reservations.append(
   223	                Reservation(
   224	                    checkout_line=line,
   225	                    stock_id=stock_data.pk,
   226	                    quantity_reserved=quantity_to_reserve,
   227	                    reserved_until=reserved_until,
   228	                )
   229	            )
   230	
   231	            quantity_reserved += quantity_to_reserve
   232	            if quantity_reserved == quantity:
   233	                return insufficient_stocks, reservations
   234	
   235	    if quantity_reserved != quantity:
   236	        insufficient_stocks.append(
   237	            InsufficientStockData(
   238	                variant=variant,
   239	                available_quantity=quantity,
   240	            )
   241	        )
   242	        return insufficient_stocks, []
   243	
   244	    return [], []
   245	
   246	
   247	def reserve_preorders(
   248	    checkout_lines: Iterable["CheckoutLine"],
   249	    variants: Iterable["ProductVariant"],
   250	    country_code: str,
   251	    channel_slug: str,
   252	    reserved_until: datetime.datetime,
   253	    *,
   254	    replace: bool = True,
   255	):
   256	    """Reserve preorders for given `checkout_lines` in given country."""
   257	    variants_ids = [line.variant_id for line in checkout_lines]
   258	    variants = [variant for variant in variants if variant.pk in variants_ids]
   259	    variants_map = {variant.id: variant for variant in variants}
   260	
   261	    all_variants_channel_listings = (
   262	        ProductVariantChannelListing.objects.filter(variant__in=variants)
   263	        .annotate_preorder_quantity_allocated()
   264	        .annotate(
   265	            available_preorder_quantity=F("preorder_quantity_threshold")
   266	            - Coalesce(Sum("preorder_allocations__quantity"), 0),
   267	        )
   268	        .select_related("channel")
   269	    )
   270	    variants_channel_listings = {
   271	        channel_listing.variant_id: channel_listing
   272	        for channel_listing in all_variants_channel_listings
   273	        if channel_listing.channel.slug == channel_slug
   274	    }
   275	
   276	    checkout_lines_to_reserve = []
   277	    for line in checkout_lines:
   278	        line_variant_channel_listing = variants_channel_listings[line.variant_id]
   279	        if (
   280	            line.variant.preorder_global_threshold
   281	            or line_variant_channel_listing.preorder_quantity_threshold is not None
   282	        ):
   283	            checkout_lines_to_reserve.append(line)
   284	
   285	    if not checkout_lines_to_reserve:
   286	        return
   287	
   288	    variant_channels: dict[int, list[ProductVariantChannelListing]] = defaultdict(list)
   289	    for channel_listing in all_variants_channel_listings:
   290	        variant_channels[channel_listing.variant_id].append(channel_listing)
   291	
   292	    variants_global_allocations = {
   293	        variant_id: sum(
   294	            channel_listing.preorder_quantity_allocated  # type: ignore[attr-defined]
   295	            for channel_listing in channel_listings
   296	        )
   297	        for variant_id, channel_listings in variant_channels.items()
   298	    }
   299	
   300	    listings_reservations: dict = get_listings_reservations(
   301	        checkout_lines, all_variants_channel_listings
   302	    )
   303	
   304	    insufficient_stocks: list[InsufficientStockData] = []
   305	    reservations: list[PreorderReservation] = []
   306	    for line in checkout_lines_to_reserve:
   307	        insufficient_stocks, reservation = _create_preorder_reservation(
   308	            line,
   309	            variants_map[line.variant_id],
   310	            variants_channel_listings[line.variant_id],
   311	            variant_channels[line.variant_id],
   312	            variants_global_allocations[line.variant_id],
   313	            listings_reservations,
   314	            insufficient_stocks,
   315	            reserved_until,
   316	        )
   317	        if reservation:
   318	            reservations.append(reservation)
   319	
   320	    if insufficient_stocks:
   321	        raise InsufficientStock(insufficient_stocks)
   322	
   323	    if reservation:
   324	        if replace:
   325	            PreorderReservation.objects.filter(
   326	                checkout_line__in=checkout_lines_to_reserve
   327	            ).delete()
   328	        PreorderReservation.objects.bulk_create(reservations)
   329	
   330	
   331	def _create_preorder_reservation(
   332	    line: "CheckoutLine",
   333	    variant: "ProductVariant",
   334	    listing: "ProductVariantChannelListing",
   335	    all_listings: list["ProductVariantChannelListing"],
   336	    global_allocations: int,
   337	    listings_reservations: dict[int, int],
   338	    insufficient_stocks: list[InsufficientStockData],
   339	    reserved_until: datetime.datetime,
   340	):
   341	    if listing.preorder_quantity_threshold is not None:
   342	        available_channel_quantity = listing.available_preorder_quantity  # type: ignore[attr-defined]
   343	        available_channel_quantity = max(
   344	            available_channel_quantity - listings_reservations[listing.id], 0
   345	        )
   346	        if line.quantity > available_channel_quantity:
   347	            insufficient_stocks.append(
   348	                InsufficientStockData(
   349	                    variant=variant,
   350	                    available_quantity=available_channel_quantity,
   351	                )
   352	            )
   353	
   354	    if variant.preorder_global_threshold:
   355	        # check global reservations
   356	        available_global_quantity = variant.preorder_global_threshold
   357	        available_global_quantity -= global_allocations
   358	        global_reservations = 0
   359	        for channel_listing in all_listings:
   360	            global_reservations += listings_reservations[channel_listing.id]
   361	
   362	        available_global_quantity -= global_reservations
   363	        available_global_quantity = max(available_global_quantity, 0)
   364	
   365	        if line.quantity > available_global_quantity:
   366	            insufficient_stocks.append(
   367	                InsufficientStockData(
   368	                    variant=variant,
   369	                    available_quantity=available_global_quantity,
   370	                )
   371	            )
   372	
   373	    if listing.preorder_quantity_threshold or variant.preorder_global_threshold:
   374	        # create reservation
   375	        return insufficient_stocks, PreorderReservation(
   376	            checkout_line=line,
   377	            product_variant_channel_listing=listing,
   378	            quantity_reserved=line.quantity,
   379	            reserved_until=reserved_until,
   380	        )
   381	
   382	    return insufficient_stocks, None
   383

   385	def get_checkout_lines_to_reserve(
   386	    lines: Iterable["CheckoutLine"],
   387	    variants_map: dict[int, "ProductVariant"],
   388	) -> Iterable["CheckoutLine"]:
   389	    """Return checkout lines which can be reserved."""
   390	    valid_lines = []
   391	    for line in lines:
   392	        if (
   393	            line.quantity
   394	            and line.variant_id
   395	            and variants_map[line.variant_id].track_inventory
   396	        ):
   397	            valid_lines.append(line)
   398	    return valid_lines

   414	def get_listings_reservations(
   415	    checkout_lines: Iterable["CheckoutLine"] | None,
   416	    all_variants_channel_listings,
   417	    database_connection_name: str = settings.DATABASE_CONNECTION_DEFAULT_NAME,
   418	) -> dict[int, int]:
   419	    quantity_reservation_list = (
   420	        PreorderReservation.objects.using(database_connection_name)
   421	        .filter(
   422	            product_variant_channel_listing__in=all_variants_channel_listings,
   423	            quantity_reserved__gt=0,
   424	        )
   425	        .not_expired()
   426	        .exclude_checkout_lines(checkout_lines)
   427	        .values("product_variant_channel_listing")
   428	        .annotate(quantity_reserved_sum=Sum("quantity_reserved"))
   429	    )
   430	    listings_reservations: dict = defaultdict(int)
   431	
   432	    for reservation in quantity_reservation_list:
   433	        listings_reservations[reservation["product_variant_channel_listing"]] += (
   434	            reservation["quantity_reserved_sum"]
   435	        )
   436	
   437	    return listings_reservations
   120	    # allocation only applied to order lines with variants with track inventory
   121	    # set to True
   122	    order_lines_info = get_order_lines_with_track_inventory(order_lines_info)
   123	    if not order_lines_info:
   124	        return
   125	
   126	    channel_slug = channel.slug
   127	
   128	    variants = [line_info.variant for line_info in order_lines_info]
   129	    filter_lookup = {"product_variant__in": variants}
   130	
   131	    if additional_filter_lookup is not None:
   132	        filter_lookup.update(additional_filter_lookup)
   133	
   134	    # in case of click and collect order, we need to check local or global stock
   135	    # regardless of the country code
   136	    if collection_point_pk:
   137	        stocks = Stock.objects.for_channel_and_click_and_collect(channel_slug)
   138	    else:
   139	        stocks = Stock.objects.for_channel_or_country(
   140	            channel_slug,
   141	            country_code,
   142	            include_shipping_zones=calculate_stocks_with_shipping_zones,
   143	        )
   144	
   145	    stocks = list(
   146	        stock_select_for_update_for_existing_qs(stocks)
   147	        .filter(**filter_lookup)
   148	        .values("id", "product_variant", "pk", "quantity", "warehouse_id")
   149	    )
   150	    stocks_id = (stock.pop("id") for stock in stocks)
   151	
   152	    quantity_reservation_for_stocks: dict = _prepare_stock_to_reserved_quantity_map(
   153	        checkout_lines, check_reservations, stocks_id
   154	    )
   155	
   156	    quantity_allocation_list = list(
   157	        Allocation.objects.filter(
   158	            stock_id__in=stocks_id,
   159	            quantity_allocated__gt=0,
   160	        )
   161	        .values("stock")
   162	        .annotate(quantity_allocated_sum=Sum("quantity_allocated"))
   163	    )
   164	    quantity_allocation_for_stocks: dict = defaultdict(int)
   165	    for allocation_data in quantity_allocation_list:
   166	        quantity_allocation_for_stocks[allocation_data["stock"]] += allocation_data[
   167	            "quantity_allocated_sum"
   168	        ]
   169	
   170	    stocks = sort_stocks(
   171	        channel.allocation_strategy,
   172	        stocks,
   173	        channel,
   174	        quantity_allocation_for_stocks,
   175	        collection_point_pk,
   176	    )
   177	
   178	    variant_to_stocks: dict[int, list[StockData]] = defaultdict(list)
   179	    for stock_data in stocks:
   180	        variant = stock_data.pop("product_variant")
   181	        variant_to_stocks[variant].append(StockData(**stock_data))
   182	
   183	    insufficient_stock: list[InsufficientStockData] = []
   184	    allocations: list[Allocation] = []
   185	    for line_info in order_lines_info:
   186	        line_info.variant = cast(ProductVariant, line_info.variant)
   187	        stock_allocations = variant_to_stocks[line_info.variant.pk]
   188	        insufficient_stock, allocation_items = _create_allocations(
   189	            line_info,
   190	            stock_allocations,
   191	            quantity_allocation_for_stocks,
   192	            quantity_reservation_for_stocks,
   193	            insufficient_stock,
   194	        )
   195	        allocations.extend(allocation_items)
   196	
   197	    if insufficient_stock:
   198	        raise InsufficientStock(insufficient_stock)
   199	
   200	    if allocations:
   201	        Allocation.objects.bulk_create(allocations)
   202	
   203	        stocks_to_update_map = {alloc.stock_id: alloc.stock for alloc in allocations}
   204	        quantity_from_allocations: dict[int, int] = defaultdict(int)
   205	
   206	        for alloc in allocations:
   207	            quantity_from_allocations[alloc.stock_id] += alloc.quantity_allocated
   208

   923	def _create_preorder_allocation(
   924	    line_info: "OrderLineInfo",
   925	    variant_channel_data: tuple[int, int | None],
   926	    variant_global_allocation: int,
   927	    variants_channel_listings: list[int],
   928	    quantity_allocation_for_channel: dict[int, int],
   929	    listings_reservations: dict[int, int],
   930	) -> tuple[PreorderAllocation | None, InsufficientStockData | None]:
   931	    variant = cast(ProductVariant, line_info.variant)
   932	    quantity = line_info.quantity
   933	    channel_listing_id, channel_quantity_threshold = variant_channel_data
   934	
   935	    if channel_quantity_threshold is not None:
   936	        channel_availability = channel_quantity_threshold
   937	        channel_availability -= quantity_allocation_for_channel[channel_listing_id]
   938	        channel_availability -= listings_reservations[channel_listing_id]
   939	        channel_availability = max(channel_availability, 0)
   940	
   941	        if quantity > channel_availability:
   942	            return None, InsufficientStockData(
   943	                variant=variant,
   944	                available_quantity=channel_availability,
   945	            )
   946	
   947	    if variant.preorder_global_threshold is not None:
   948	        global_availability = variant.preorder_global_threshold
   949	        global_availability -= variant_global_allocation
   950	        for listing_id in variants_channel_listings:
   951	            global_availability -= listings_reservations[listing_id]
   952	        global_availability = max(global_availability, 0)
   953	
   954	        if quantity > global_availability:
   955	            return None, InsufficientStockData(
   956	                variant=variant, available_quantity=global_availability
   957	            )
   958	
   959	    return (
   960	        PreorderAllocation(
   961	            order_line=line_info.line,
   962	            product_variant_channel_listing_id=channel_listing_id,
   963	            quantity=quantity,
   964	        ),
   965	        None,
   966	    )

   970	def deactivate_preorder_for_variant(product_variant: ProductVariant):
   971	    """Complete preorder for product variant.
   972	
   973	    All preorder settings should be cleared and all preorder allocations
   974	    should be replaced by regular allocations.
   975	    """
   976	    if not product_variant.is_preorder:
   977	        return
   978	    channel_listings = ProductVariantChannelListing.objects.filter(
   979	        variant_id=product_variant.pk
   980	    )
   981	    channel_listings_pk = (channel_listing.id for channel_listing in channel_listings)
   982	    preorder_allocations = (
   983	        PreorderAllocation.objects.filter(
   984	            product_variant_channel_listing_id__in=channel_listings_pk
   985	        )
   986	        .select_for_update(of=("self",))
   987	        .select_related("order_line", "order_line__order")
   988	    )
   989	
   990	    allocations_to_create = []

   993	    for preorder_allocation in preorder_allocations:
   994	        stock = _get_stock_for_preorder_allocation(preorder_allocation, product_variant)
   995	        if stock._state.adding:
   996	            stock.quantity_allocated += preorder_allocation.quantity
   997	            stocks_to_create.append(stock)
   998	        else:
   999	            stock.quantity_allocated = (
  1000	                F("quantity_allocated") + preorder_allocation.quantity
  1001	            )
  1002	            stocks_to_update.append(stock)
  1003	        allocations_to_create.append(
  1004	            Allocation(
  1005	                order_line=preorder_allocation.order_line,
  1006	                stock=stock,
  1007	                quantity_allocated=preorder_allocation.quantity,
  1008	            )
  1009	        )
  1010	
  1011	    if stocks_to_create:
  1012	        Stock.objects.bulk_create(stocks_to_create)
  1013	
  1014	    if stocks_to_update:
  1015	        Stock.objects.bulk_update(stocks_to_update, ["quantity_allocated"])
  1016	
  1017	    if allocations_to_create:
  1018	        Allocation.objects.bulk_create(allocations_to_create)
  1019	
  1020	    if preorder_allocations:
  1021	        preorder_allocations.delete()
  1022	
  1023	    product_variant.preorder_global_threshold = None
  1024	    product_variant.preorder_end_date = None
  1025	    product_variant.is_preorder = False
  1026	    product_variant.save(
  1027	        update_fields=[
  1028	            "preorder_global_threshold",

  1040	def _get_stock_for_preorder_allocation(
  1041	    preorder_allocation: PreorderAllocation, product_variant: ProductVariant
  1042	) -> Stock:
  1043	    """Return stock where preordered variant should be allocated.
  1044	
  1045	    By default this function uses any warehouse from the shipping zone that matches
  1046	    order's shipping method. If order has no shipping method set, it uses any warehouse
  1047	    that matches order's country. Function returns existing stock for selected warehouse
  1048	    or creates a new one unsaved `Stock` instance. Function raises an error if there is
  1049	    no warehouse assigned to any shipping zone handles order's country.
  1050	    """
  1051	    order = preorder_allocation.order_line.order
  1052	    shipping_method_id = order.shipping_method_id
  1053	
  1054	    if shipping_method_id is not None:
  1055	        warehouse = Warehouse.objects.filter(
  1056	            shipping_zones__id=order.shipping_method.shipping_zone_id  # type: ignore[union-attr]
  1057	        ).first()
  1058	    else:
  1059	        from ..order.utils import get_order_country
  1060	
  1061	        country = get_order_country(order)
  1062	        warehouse = Warehouse.objects.filter(
  1063	            shipping_zones__countries__contains=country
  1064	        ).first()
  1065	
  1066	    if not warehouse:
  1067	        raise PreorderAllocationError(preorder_allocation.order_line)
  1068	
  1069	    stock = list(
  1070	        stock_qs_select_for_update().filter(
  1071	            warehouse=warehouse, product_variant=product_variant
  1072	        )
  1073	    )
  1074	
  1075	    return (stock[0] if stock else None) or Stock(
  1076	        warehouse=warehouse, product_variant=product_variant, quantity=0
  1077	    )

   115	def get_rule_translations(

   117	):
   118	    promotion_translations = [

   121	        if translation.language_code == translation_language_code
   122	    ]

   130	        if translation.language_code == translation_language_code
   131	    ]
   132	    rule_translation = rule_translations[0] if rule_translations else None

    84	def calculate_discounted_price_for_rules(
    85	    *, price: Money, rules: Iterable["PromotionRule"], currency: str
    86	):
    87	    """Calculate the discounted price for provided rules.
    88	
    89	    The discounts from rules summed up and applied to the price.
    90	    """
    91	    total_discount = zero_money(currency)
    92	    for rule in rules:
    93	        discount = rule.get_discount(currency)
    94	        total_discount += price - discount(price)
    95	
    96	    return max(price - total_discount, zero_money(currency))

    99	def calculate_discounted_price_for_promotions(
   100	    *,
   101	    price: Money,
   102	    rules_info_per_variant: dict[int, list[PromotionRuleInfo]],
   103	    channel: "Channel",
   104	    variant_id: int,
   105	) -> tuple[UUID, Money] | None:
   106	    """Return minimum product's price of all prices with promotions applied."""
   107	    applied_discount = None
   108	    rules_info_for_variant = rules_info_per_variant.get(variant_id)
   109	    if rules_info_for_variant:
   110	        applied_discount = get_best_promotion_discount(
   111	            price, rules_info_for_variant, channel
   112	        )
   113	    return applied_discount
   114	
   115	
   116	def get_best_promotion_discount(
   117	    price: Money,
   118	    rules_info_for_variant: list[PromotionRuleInfo],
   119	    channel: "Channel",
   120	) -> tuple[UUID, Money] | None:
   121	    """Return the rule with the discount amount for the best promotion.
   122	
   123	    The data for the promotion that gives the best saving are returned in the following
   124	    shape:
   125	        (rule_id_1, discount_amount_1)
   126	    """
   127	    available_discounts = []
   128	    for rule_id, discount in get_product_promotion_discounts(
   129	        rules_info=rules_info_for_variant,
   130	        channel=channel,
   131	    ):
   132	        available_discounts.append((rule_id, discount))
   133	
   134	    applied_discount = None
   135	    if available_discounts:
   136	        applied_discount = max(
   137	            [
   138	                (rule_id, price - discount(price))
   139	                for rule_id, discount in available_discounts
   140	            ],
   141	            key=lambda x: x[1].amount,  # sort over a max discount
   142	        )
   143	
   144	    return applied_discount
   145	
   146	
   147	def get_product_promotion_discounts(
   148	    *,
   149	    rules_info: list[PromotionRuleInfo],
   150	    channel: "Channel",
   151	) -> Iterator[tuple[UUID, Callable]]:
   152	    """Return rule id, discount value for all rules applicable for given channel."""
   153	    for rule_info in rules_info:
   154	        try:
   155	            yield get_product_discount_on_promotion(rule_info, channel)
   156	        except NotApplicable:
   157	            pass
   158	
   159	
   160	def get_product_discount_on_promotion(
   161	    rule_info: PromotionRuleInfo,
   162	    channel: "Channel",
   163	) -> tuple[UUID, Callable]:
   164	    """Return rule id, discount value if rule applied or raise NotApplicable."""
   165	    if channel.id in rule_info.channel_ids:
   166	        return rule_info.rule.id, rule_info.rule.get_discount(channel.currency_code)
   167	    raise NotApplicable("Promotion rule not applicable for this product")

   170	def is_discounted_line_by_catalogue_promotion(
   171	    variant_channel_listing: "ProductVariantChannelListing",
   172	) -> bool:
   173	    """Return True when the price is discounted by catalogue promotion."""
   174	    price_amount = variant_channel_listing.price_amount
   175	    discounted_price_amount = variant_channel_listing.discounted_price_amount
   176	
   177	    if (
   178	        price_amount is None
   179	        or discounted_price_amount is None
   180	        or price_amount == discounted_price_amount
   181	    ):
   182	        return False
   183	
   184	    return True

   187	def _get_rule_discount_amount(
   188	    line: Union["CheckoutLine", "OrderLine"],
   189	    rule_info: "VariantPromotionRuleInfo",
   190	    channel: "Channel",
   191	) -> Decimal:
   192	    """Calculate the discount amount for catalogue promotion rule.
   193	
   194	    When the line has overridden price, the discount is applied on the
   195	    new overridden base price.
   196	    """
   197	    variant_listing_promotion_rule = rule_info.variant_listing_promotion_rule
   198	    if not variant_listing_promotion_rule:
   199	        return Decimal("0.0")
   200	
   201	    if isinstance(line, CheckoutLine):
   202	        price_override = (
   203	            Money(line.price_override, channel.currency_code)
   204	            if line.price_override is not None
   205	            else None
   206	        )
   207	    else:
   208	        price_override = (
   209	            line.undiscounted_base_unit_price if line.is_price_overridden else None
   210	        )
   211	
   212	    if price_override is not None:
   213	        # calculate discount amount on overridden price
   214	        discount = rule_info.rule.get_discount(channel.currency_code)
   215	        discounted_price = discount(price_override)
   216	        discount_amount = (price_override - discounted_price).amount
   217	    else:
   218	        discount_amount = variant_listing_promotion_rule.discount_amount
   219	    return discount_amount * line.quantity

   223	    if promotion.name and rule.name:

   225	    return rule.name or promotion.name

   233	    if rule_translation:

    29	def update_discounted_prices_for_promotion(
    30	    products: ProductsQueryset, only_dirty_products: bool = False
    31	) -> list[VariantDiscountedPriceChange]:
    32	    """Update Products and ProductVariants discounted prices.
    33	
    34	    The discounted price is the minimal price of the product/variant based on active
    35	    promotions that are applied to a given product.
    36	    If there is no applied promotion rule, the discounted price for the product
    37	    is equal to the cheapest variant price, in the case of the variant it's equal
    38	    to the variant price.
    39	
    40	    When only_dirty_products set to True, the prices will be recalculated only for the
    41	    listings marked as dirty.
    42	
    43	    Returns a list of VariantDiscountedPriceChange for variants whose discounted price
    44	    changed.
    45	    """
    46	    variant_qs = ProductVariant.objects.using(
    47	        settings.DATABASE_CONNECTION_REPLICA_NAME
    48	    ).filter(Exists(products.filter(id=OuterRef("product_id"))))
    49	    rules_info_per_variant = get_variants_to_promotion_rules_map(variant_qs)
    50	    product_to_variant_listings_per_channel_map = (
    51	        _get_product_to_variant_channel_listings_per_channel_map(variant_qs)
    52	    )
    53	    variant_listing_to_listing_rule_per_rule_map = (
    54	        _get_variant_listings_to_listing_rule_per_rule_id_map(variant_qs)
    55	    )
    56	
    57	    changed_products_listings_to_update = []
    58	    changed_variants_listings_to_update = []
    59	
    60	    changed_variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create = []
    61	    changed_variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_update = []
    62	
    63	    changed_variant_prices: list[VariantDiscountedPriceChange] = []
    64	
    65	    product_channel_listings = (
    66	        ProductChannelListing.objects.using(settings.DATABASE_CONNECTION_REPLICA_NAME)
    67	        .filter(Exists(products.filter(id=OuterRef("product_id"))))
    68	        .prefetch_related("channel")
    69	    )
    70	    if only_dirty_products:
    71	        product_channel_listings.filter(discounted_price_dirty=True)
    72	
    73	    for product_channel_listing in product_channel_listings:
    74	        product_id = product_channel_listing.product_id
    75	        channel_id = product_channel_listing.channel_id
    76	        variant_listings = product_to_variant_listings_per_channel_map[product_id][
    77	            channel_id
    78	        ]
    79	        if not variant_listings:
    80	            continue
    81	        (
    82	            discounted_variants_price,
    83	            variant_listings_to_update,
    84	            variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create,
    85	            variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_update,
    86	            variant_price_changes,
    87	        ) = _get_discounted_variants_prices_for_promotions(
    88	            variant_listings,
    89	            rules_info_per_variant,
    90	            product_channel_listing.channel,
    91	            variant_listing_to_listing_rule_per_rule_map,
    92	        )
    93	
    94	        product_discounted_price = min(discounted_variants_price)
    95	        changed_variants_listings_to_update.extend(variant_listings_to_update)
    96	        changed_variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create.extend(
    97	            variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create
    98	        )
    99	        changed_variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_update.extend(
   100	            variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_update
   101	        )
   102	
   103	        changed_variant_prices.extend(variant_price_changes)
   104	
   105	        # check if the product discounted_price has changed
   106	        if product_channel_listing.discounted_price != product_discounted_price:
   107	            product_channel_listing.discounted_price_amount = (
   108	                product_discounted_price.amount
   109	            )
   110	            changed_products_listings_to_update.append(product_channel_listing)
   111	
   112	    _update_or_create_listings(
   113	        changed_products_listings_to_update,
   114	        changed_variants_listings_to_update,
   115	        changed_variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create,
   116	        changed_variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_update,
   117	    )
   118	
   119	    return changed_variant_prices

   122	def _update_or_create_listings(
   123	    changed_products_listings_to_update: list[ProductChannelListing],
   124	    changed_variants_listings_to_update: list[ProductVariantChannelListing],
   125	    changed_variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create: list[
   126	        VariantChannelListingPromotionRule
   127	    ],
   128	    changed_variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_update: list[
   129	        VariantChannelListingPromotionRule
   130	    ],
   131	):
   132	    if changed_products_listings_to_update:
   133	        ProductChannelListing.objects.bulk_update(
   134	            sorted(changed_products_listings_to_update, key=lambda listing: listing.id),
   135	            ["discounted_price_amount"],
   136	        )
   137	    if changed_variants_listings_to_update:
   138	        ProductVariantChannelListing.objects.bulk_update(
   139	            sorted(changed_variants_listings_to_update, key=lambda listing: listing.id),
   140	            ["discounted_price_amount"],
   141	        )
   142	    if changed_variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create:
   143	        _create_variant_listing_promotion_rule(
   144	            changed_variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create
   145	        )
   146	    if changed_variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_update:
   147	        VariantChannelListingPromotionRule.objects.bulk_update(
   148	            sorted(
   149	                changed_variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_update,
   150	                key=lambda listing: listing.id,

   152	            ["discount_amount"],
   153	        )

   156	def _create_variant_listing_promotion_rule(variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create):
   157	    with transaction.atomic():
   158	        rule_ids = [
   159	            listing.promotion_rule_id
   160	            for listing in variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create
   161	        ]
   162	        listing_ids = [
   163	            listing.variant_channel_listing_id
   164	            for listing in variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create
   165	        ]
   166	        # Lock PromotionRule and ProductVariantChannelListing before bulk_create
   167	        rules = (
   168	            PromotionRule.objects.filter(id__in=rule_ids)
   169	            .select_for_update()
   170	            .order_by("pk")
   171	        )
   172	        variant_listings = (
   173	            ProductVariantChannelListing.objects.filter(id__in=listing_ids)
   174	            .select_for_update()
   175	            .order_by("pk")
   176	        )
   177	        # Do not create VariantChannelListingPromotionRule for rules that were deleted.
   178	        if len(rules) < len(rule_ids):
   179	            variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create = [
   180	                listing
   181	                for listing in variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create
   182	                if listing.promotion_rule_id in {rule.id for rule in rules}
   183	            ]
   184	        if len(variant_listings) < len(listing_ids):
   185	            variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create = [
   186	                listing
   187	                for listing in variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create
   188	                if listing.variant_channel_listing_id
   189	                in {listing.id for listing in variant_listings}
   190	            ]
   191	        # After migrating to Django 4.0 we should use `update_conflicts` instead
   192	        # of `ignore_conflicts`
   193	        # https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/4.1/ref/models/querysets/#bulk-create
   194	        VariantChannelListingPromotionRule.objects.bulk_create(
   195	            variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create, ignore_conflicts=True
   196	        )

   199	def _get_product_to_variant_channel_listings_per_channel_map(
   200	    variants: ProductVariantQueryset,
   201	):
   202	    variant_channel_listings = ProductVariantChannelListing.objects.filter(
   203	        Exists(variants.filter(id=OuterRef("variant_id"))), price_amount__isnull=False
   204	    )
   205	    variant_to_product_id = dict(
   206	        variants.values_list("id", "product_id").iterator(chunk_size=1000)
   207	    )
   208	
   209	    price_data: dict[int, dict[int, list[Money]]] = defaultdict(
   210	        lambda: defaultdict(list)
   211	    )
   212	    for variant_channel_listing in variant_channel_listings.iterator(chunk_size=1000):
   213	        try:
   214	            product_id = variant_to_product_id[variant_channel_listing.variant_id]
   215	        except KeyError:
   216	            continue
   217	        price_data[product_id][variant_channel_listing.channel_id].append(
   218	            variant_channel_listing
   219	        )
   220	    return price_data

   248	        rule_id = variant_listing_promotion_rule.promotion_rule_id
   249	        variant_listing_rule_data[listing_id][rule_id] = variant_listing_promotion_rule

   623	):

   627	        line["lineNumber"]: line for line in response.get("lines", [])
   628	    }

   636	        if response_line.get("itemCode") != variant_item_code:

    37	def serialize_checkout_lines(checkout: "Checkout") -> list[dict]:
    38	    data = []
    39	    channel = checkout.channel
    40	    currency = channel.currency_code
    41	    lines, _ = fetch_checkout_lines(checkout, prefetch_variant_attributes=True)
    42	    for line_info in lines:
    43	        variant = line_info.variant
    44	        product = variant.product
    45	        base_price = line_info.undiscounted_unit_price
    46	        total_discount_amount_for_line = sum(
    47	            [discount.amount_value for discount in line_info.get_promotion_discounts()],
    48	            Decimal(0),
    49	        )
    50	        if total_discount_amount_for_line:
    51	            unit_discount_amount = (
    52	                total_discount_amount_for_line / line_info.line.quantity
    53	            )
    54	            unit_discount = Money(unit_discount_amount, currency)
    55	            unit_discount = quantize_price(unit_discount, currency)
    56	            base_price -= unit_discount
    57	        data.append(
    58	            {
    59	                "sku": variant.sku,
    60	                "variant_id": variant.get_global_id(),
    61	                "quantity": line_info.line.quantity,
    62	                "base_price": str(quantize_price(base_price.amount, currency)),
    63	                "currency": currency,
    64	                "full_name": serialize_variant_full_name(variant),
    65	                "product_name": product.name,
    66	                "variant_name": variant.name,
    67	                "attributes": serialize_variant_attributes(variant),
    68	            }
    69	        )

    39	def _trigger(
    40	    event_type: str,

    42	    site_settings: "SiteSettings",
    43	    requestor: T_REQUESTOR,

    46	    # channel stock availability events are only triggered when legacy shipping
    47	    # zone stock availability is disabled

    54

    51	    DataLoader[VariantIdCountryCodeChannelSlug, int]

    53	    """Calculates available variant quantity based on variant ID and country code.
    54	
    55	    For each country code, for each shipping zone supporting that country,
    56	    calculate the maximum available quantity, then return either that number
    57	    or the maximum allowed checkout quantity, whichever is lower.
    58	    """
    59	
    60	    context_key = "available_quantity_by_productvariant_and_country"
    61	
    62	    def batch_load(self, keys: Iterable[VariantIdCountryCodeChannelSlug]) -> list[int]:
    63	        # Split the list of keys by country first. A typical query will only touch
    64	        # a handful of unique countries but may access thousands of product variants,
    65	        # so it's cheaper to execute one query per country.
    66	        variants_by_country_and_channel: defaultdict[
    67	            tuple[CountryCode, str], list[int]
    68	        ] = defaultdict(list)
    69	        for variant_id, country_code, channel_slug in keys:
    70	            variants_by_country_and_channel[(country_code, channel_slug)].append(
    71	                variant_id
    72	            )
    73	
    74	        # For each country code execute a single query for all product variants.
    75	        quantity_by_variant_and_country: defaultdict[
    76	            VariantIdCountryCodeChannelSlug, int
    77	        ] = defaultdict(int)
    78	
    79	        site = None
    80	        if variants_by_country_and_channel:
    81	            site = get_site_promise(self.context).get()
    82	            for key, variant_ids in variants_by_country_and_channel.items():
    83	                country_code, channel_slug = key
    84	                quantities = self.batch_load_quantities_by_country(
    85	                    country_code, channel_slug, variant_ids, site
    86	                )
    87	                for variant_id, quantity in quantities:
    88	                    quantity_by_variant_and_country[
    89	                        (variant_id, country_code, channel_slug)
    90	                    ] = max(0, quantity)
    91	
    92	        return [quantity_by_variant_and_country[key] for key in keys]

   201	def _get_variant_channels_without_other_availability(
   202	    stocks: list[Stock],
   203	    cc_options: list[str],
   204	    source_warehouses_data: dict[UUID, SourceWarehouseData] | None = None,

   206	    """Return (variant_id, channel_slug) pairs where the source stocks are the only availability.
   207	
   208	    For each stock, inspects every channel its warehouse belongs to. A pair is
   209	    included when no other warehouse of the same kind (C&C or non-C&C) in that
   210	    channel has available quantity for the stock's variant. Deduplicated so that
   211	    multiple stocks for the same variant produce only one entry per channel.
   212	
   213	    When `source_warehouses_data` is provided, it is used for the source
   214	    warehouses instead of querying `ChannelWarehouse` — needed when source
   215	    warehouses are already deleted by the time this runs.
   216	    """
   217	    source_warehouse_ids = {stock.warehouse_id for stock in stocks}
   218

   220	        _fetch_other_warehouses_availability_per_variant(
   221	            stocks, cc_options, source_warehouses_data
   222	        )

   227	    }
   228	    if source_warehouses_data is not None:
   229	        other_ids = availability_warehouse_ids - set(source_warehouses_data)
   230	        warehouse_id_to_channels_map = {
   231	            warehouse_id: snapshot.channels
   232	            for warehouse_id, snapshot in source_warehouses_data.items()
   233	        } | get_warehouse_to_channels_map(list(other_ids))
   234	    else:
   235	        warehouse_id_to_channels_map = get_warehouse_to_channels_map(
   236	            list(availability_warehouse_ids | source_warehouse_ids)
   237	        )
   238

   241	    )
   242	
   243	    result: set[tuple[int, str]] = set()
   244	    for stock in stocks:
   245	        for channel_id, channel_slug in warehouse_id_to_channels_map.get(

   247	        ):

   254	def _fetch_other_warehouses_availability_per_variant(
   255	    stocks: list[Stock],
   256	    cc_options: list[str],
   257	    source_warehouses_data: dict[UUID, SourceWarehouseData] | None = None,
   258	) -> dict[tuple[UUID, int], int]:
   259	    """Fetch available quantity per (warehouse_id, variant_id) excluding source stocks.
   260	
   261	    Considers only warehouses of the matching C&C kind in channels that contain
   262	    any source stock's warehouse. Source warehouses themselves are included in
   263	    the scope because warehouse A may serve as "the other warehouse" for a stock
   264	    in warehouse B. The source stock rows are excluded from the aggregation so
   265	    the returned map represents availability from everywhere *except* the
   266	    source stocks.
   267

   269	    derived from the snapshot instead of from `ChannelWarehouse` — needed when
   270	    source warehouses are already deleted.

   275	
   276	    if source_warehouses_data is not None:
   277	        source_channel_ids = {
   278	            channel_id
   279	            for snapshot in source_warehouses_data.values()
   280	            for channel_id, _ in snapshot.channels
   281	        }
   282	        channel_warehouses = ChannelWarehouse.objects.filter(
   283	            channel_id__in=source_channel_ids

   287	            warehouse_id__in=warehouse_ids,
   288	            channel_id=OuterRef("channel_id"),
   289	        )
   290	        channel_warehouses = ChannelWarehouse.objects.filter(Exists(source_channels))

   292	        Exists(channel_warehouses.filter(warehouse_id=OuterRef("pk"))),
   293	        click_and_collect_option__in=cc_options,
   294	    )

   296	    available_rows = (

254	def _get_discounted_variants_prices_for_promotions(
   255	    variant_listings: list[ProductVariantChannelListing],
   256	    rules_info_per_variant: dict[int, list[PromotionRuleInfo]],
   257	    channel: Channel,
   258	    variant_listing_to_listing_rule_per_rule_map: dict,
   259	) -> tuple[
   260	    list[Money],
   261	    list[ProductVariantChannelListing],
   262	    list[VariantChannelListingPromotionRule],
   263	    list[VariantChannelListingPromotionRule],
   264	    list[VariantDiscountedPriceChange],
   265	]:
   266	    variants_listings_to_update: list[ProductVariantChannelListing] = []
   267	    discounted_variants_price: list[Money] = []
   268	    variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create: list[
   269	        VariantChannelListingPromotionRule
   270	    ] = []
   271	    variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_update: list[
   272	        VariantChannelListingPromotionRule
   273	    ] = []
   274	    variant_price_changes: list[VariantDiscountedPriceChange] = []
   275	
   276	    for variant_listing in variant_listings:
   277	        applied_discount = calculate_discounted_price_for_promotions(
   278	            price=variant_listing.price,
   279	            rules_info_per_variant=rules_info_per_variant,
   280	            channel=channel,
   281	            variant_id=variant_listing.variant_id,
   282	        )
   283	        discounted_variant_price = variant_listing.price
   284	
   285	        rule_id = None
   286	        if applied_discount:
   287	            rule_id, discount = applied_discount
   288	            discounted_variant_price -= discount
   289	            discounted_variant_price = max(
   290	                discounted_variant_price, zero_money(discounted_variant_price.currency)
   291	            )
   292	
   293	            _handle_discount_rule_id(
   294	                variant_listing,
   295	                rule_id,
   296	                variant_listing_to_listing_rule_per_rule_map,
   297	                discount.amount,
   298	                channel.currency_code,
   299	                variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_update,
   300	                variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create,
   301	            )
   302	
   303	        if variant_listing.discounted_price != discounted_variant_price:
   304	            previous_price_amount = cast(
   305	                Decimal,
   306	                variant_listing.discounted_price_amount
   307	                if variant_listing.discounted_price_amount is not None
   308	                else variant_listing.price_amount,
   309	            )
   310	            variant_price_changes.append(
   311	                VariantDiscountedPriceChange(
   312	                    variant_id=variant_listing.variant_id,
   313	                    channel_slug=channel.slug,
   314	                    previous_price_amount=previous_price_amount,
   315	                    new_price_amount=discounted_variant_price.amount,
   316	                    currency=channel.currency_code,
   317	                )
   318	            )
   319	
   320	            variant_listing.discounted_price_amount = discounted_variant_price.amount
   321	            variants_listings_to_update.append(variant_listing)
   322	
   323	            # delete variant listing - promotion rules relations that are not valid
   324	            # anymore
   325	            VariantChannelListingPromotionRule.objects.filter(
   326	                variant_channel_listing_id=variant_listing.id
   327	            ).exclude(promotion_rule_id=rule_id).delete()
   328	
   329	        discounted_variants_price.append(discounted_variant_price)
   330	
   331	    return (
   332	        discounted_variants_price,
   333	        variants_listings_to_update,
   334	        variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create,
   335	        variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_update,
   336	        variant_price_changes,
   337	    )

   340	def _handle_discount_rule_id(
   341	    variant_listing: ProductVariantChannelListing,
   342	    rule_id: UUID,
   343	    variant_listing_to_listing_rule_per_rule_map: dict,
   344	    discount_amount: Decimal,
   345	    currency: str,
   346	    variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_update: list[VariantChannelListingPromotionRule],
   347	    variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create: list[VariantChannelListingPromotionRule],
   348	):
   349	    listing_promotion_rule = variant_listing_to_listing_rule_per_rule_map[
   350	        variant_listing.id
   351	    ].get(rule_id)
   352	    if listing_promotion_rule:
   353	        listing_promotion_rule.discount_amount = discount_amount
   354	        variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_update.append(listing_promotion_rule)

   359	                promotion_rule_id=rule_id,
   360	                discount_amount=discount_amount,
   361	                currency=currency,
   362	            )
   363	        )

    32	def _get_total_discount_from_range(
    33	    undiscounted: TaxedMoneyRange, discounted: TaxedMoneyRange
    34	) -> TaxedMoney | None:
    35	    """Calculate the discount amount between two TaxedMoneyRange.
    36	
    37	    Subtract two prices and return their total discount, if any.
    38	    Otherwise, it returns None.
    39	    """
    40	    return _get_total_discount(undiscounted.start, discounted.start)
    41	
    42	
    43	def _get_total_discount(
    44	    undiscounted: TaxedMoney, discounted: TaxedMoney
    45	) -> TaxedMoney | None:
    46	    """Calculate the discount amount between two TaxedMoney.
    47	
    48	    Subtract two prices and return their total discount, if any.
    49	    Otherwise, it returns None.
    50	    """
    51	    if undiscounted > discounted:
    52	        return undiscounted - discounted
    53	    return None

    56	def get_product_price_range(
    57	    *,
    58	    variants_channel_listing: list[ProductVariantChannelListing],
    59	    field: Literal["price", "discounted_price", "prior_price"],
    60	) -> MoneyRange | None:
    61	    """Return the range of product prices based on product variants prices.
    62	
    63	    When discounted parameter is True, the range of discounted prices is provided.
    64	    """
    65	    prices = []
    66	    for channel_listing in variants_channel_listing:
    67	        price: Money | None = channel_listing.__getattribute__(field)
    68	        if price is not None:
    69	            prices.append(price)
    70	    if prices:
    71	        return MoneyRange(min(prices), max(prices))
    72	
    73	    return None

    76	def _calculate_product_price_with_taxes(
    77	    price: Money,
    78	    tax_rate: Decimal,
    79	    tax_calculation_strategy: str,
    80	    prices_entered_with_tax: bool,
    81	):
    82	    # Currently only FLAT_RATES strategy allows calculating taxes for product types;
    83	    # support for apps will be added in the future.
    84	    if tax_calculation_strategy == TaxCalculationStrategy.FLAT_RATES:
    85	        return calculate_flat_rate_tax(price, tax_rate, prices_entered_with_tax)
    86	    return TaxedMoney(price, price)

    89	def _calculate_product_price_with_taxes_range(
    90	    field: Literal["price", "discounted_price", "prior_price"],
    91	    variants_channel_listing: list[ProductVariantChannelListing],
    92	    tax_rate: Decimal,
    93	    tax_calculation_strategy: str,
    94	    prices_entered_with_tax: bool,
    95	) -> TaxedMoneyRange | None:
    96	    price: TaxedMoneyRange | None = None
    97	    price_net_range = get_product_price_range(
    98	        variants_channel_listing=variants_channel_listing, field=field
    99	    )
   100	    if price_net_range is not None:
   101	        price = TaxedMoneyRange(
   102	            start=_calculate_product_price_with_taxes(
   103	                price_net_range.start,
   104	                tax_rate,
   105	                tax_calculation_strategy,
   106	                prices_entered_with_tax,
   107	            ),
   108	            stop=_calculate_product_price_with_taxes(
   109	                price_net_range.stop,
   110	                tax_rate,
   111	                tax_calculation_strategy,
   112	                prices_entered_with_tax,
   113	            ),
   114	        )
   115	
   116	    return price

   119	def get_product_availability(
   120	    *,
   121	    product_channel_listing: ProductChannelListing | None,
   122	    variants_channel_listing: list[ProductVariantChannelListing],
   123	    prices_entered_with_tax: bool,
   124	    tax_calculation_strategy: str,
   125	    tax_rate: Decimal,
   126	) -> ProductAvailability:
   127	    undiscounted: TaxedMoneyRange | None = _calculate_product_price_with_taxes_range(
   128	        "price",
   129	        variants_channel_listing,
   130	        tax_rate,
   131	        tax_calculation_strategy,
   132	        prices_entered_with_tax,
   133	    )
   134	
   135	    discounted: TaxedMoneyRange | None = None
   136	    prior: TaxedMoneyRange | None = None
   137	
   138	    if undiscounted is not None:
   139	        discounted = _calculate_product_price_with_taxes_range(
   140	            "discounted_price",
   141	            variants_channel_listing,
   142	            tax_rate,
   143	            tax_calculation_strategy,
   144	            prices_entered_with_tax,
   145	        )
   146	
   147	        prior = _calculate_product_price_with_taxes_range(
   148	            "prior_price",
   149	            variants_channel_listing,
   150	            tax_rate,
   151	            tax_calculation_strategy,
   152	            prices_entered_with_tax,
   153	        )
   154	
   155	    discount = None
   156	    if undiscounted is not None and discounted is not None:
   157	        discount = _get_total_discount_from_range(undiscounted, discounted)
   158	
   159	    discount_prior = None
   160	    if prior is not None and discounted is not None:
   161	        discount_prior = _get_total_discount_from_range(prior, discounted)
   162	
   163	    is_visible = (
   164	        product_channel_listing is not None and product_channel_listing.is_visible
   165	    )
   166	    is_on_sale = is_visible and discount is not None
   167	
   168	    return ProductAvailability(
   169	        on_sale=is_on_sale,
   170	        price_range=discounted,
   171	        price_range_undiscounted=undiscounted,
   172	        price_range_prior=prior,
   173	        discount=discount,
   174	        discount_prior=discount_prior,
   175	    )

    55	    products = Product.objects.using(db_conn).filter(pk__in=product_ids).order_by("pk")
    56	    for product_pks in queryset_in_batches(products, PRODUCTS_BATCH_SIZE):
    57	        value_ids = (
    58	            AssignedProductAttributeValue.objects.using(db_conn)
    59	            .filter(product_id__in=product_pks)
    60	            .values_list("value_id", flat=True)
    61	        )
    62	        value_to_page_id = (
    63	            AttributeValue.objects.using(db_conn)
    64	            .filter(id__in=value_ids, reference_page_id__isnull=False)
    65	            .values_list("id", "reference_page_id")
    66	        )
    67	        page_id_to_title_map = dict(
    68	            Page.objects.using(db_conn)
    69	            .filter(id__in=[page_id for _, page_id in value_to_page_id])
    70	            .values_list("id", "title")
    71	        )
    72	
    73	        products_batch = list(Product.objects.using(db_conn).filter(id__in=product_pks))
    74	        _prep_product_search_vector_index(products_batch, page_id_to_title_map)
    75	
    76	
    77	def prepare_product_search_vector_value(
    78	    product: "Product",
    79	    *,
    80	    already_prefetched=False,
    81	    page_id_to_title_map: dict[int, str] | None = None,
    82	) -> list[NoValidationSearchVector]:
    83	    if not already_prefetched:
    84	        prefetch_related_objects([product], *PRODUCT_FIELDS_TO_PREFETCH)
    85	
    86	    search_vectors = [
    87	        NoValidationSearchVector(Value(product.name), config="simple", weight="A"),
    88	        NoValidationSearchVector(
    89	            Value(product.description_plaintext), config="simple", weight="C"
    90	        ),
    91	        *generate_attributes_search_vector_value(
    92	            product, page_id_to_title_map=page_id_to_title_map
    93	        ),
    94	        *generate_variants_search_vector_value(product),
    95	    ]
    96	    return search_vectors
    97	
    98	
    99	def generate_variants_search_vector_value(
   100	    product: "Product",
   101	) -> list[NoValidationSearchVector]:
   102	    variants = list(product.variants.all()[: settings.PRODUCT_MAX_INDEXED_VARIANTS])
   103	
   104	    search_vectors = [
   105	        NoValidationSearchVector(
   106	            Value(variant.sku), Value(variant.name), config="simple", weight="A"
   107	        )
   108	        if variant.sku
   109	        else NoValidationSearchVector(Value(variant.name), config="simple", weight="A")
   110	        for variant in variants
   111	        if variant.sku or variant.name
   112	    ]
   113	    if search_vectors:
   114	        for variant in variants:
   115	            search_vectors += generate_attributes_search_vector_value_with_assignment(
   116	                variant.attributes.all()[: settings.PRODUCT_MAX_INDEXED_ATTRIBUTES]
   117	            )
   118	    return search_vectors

   457	    @transaction.atomic
   458	    def delete(self, *args, **kwargs):
   459	        if self.sort_order is not None:
   460	            qs = self.get_ordering_queryset()
   461	            if qs.filter(sort_order__gt=self.sort_order).update(
   462	                sort_order=F("sort_order") - 1
   463	            ):
   464	                if self.attribute.max_sort_order is None:
   465	                    value = self._calculate_sort_order_value()
   466	                    self.attribute.max_sort_order = max(value - 1, 0)
   467	                    self.attribute.save(update_fields=["max_sort_order"])
   468	                else:
   469	                    Attribute.objects.filter(pk=self.attribute.pk).update(
   470	                        max_sort_order=Case(
   471	                            When(
   472	                                Q(max_sort_order__gt=0),
   473	                                then=F("max_sort_order") - 1,
   474	                            ),
   475	                            default=Value(0),
   476	                        )
   477	                    )
   478	
   479	        super().delete(*args, **kwargs)
   480	
   481	    def _calculate_sort_order_value(self):
   482	        qs = self.get_ordering_queryset()
   483	        existing_max = SortableModel.get_max_sort_order(qs)
   484	        return -1 if existing_max is None else existing_max
   485	
   486	    def _save_new_max_sort_order(self, value):
   487	        self.sort_order = value
   488	        self.attribute.max_sort_order = value
   489	        self.attribute.save(update_fields=["max_sort_order"])
   490	
   491	    def set_current_sorting_order(self):
   492	        if self.attribute.max_sort_order is None:
   493	            value = self._calculate_sort_order_value()
   494	            self._save_new_max_sort_order(value + 1)
   495	        else:
   496	            Attribute.objects.filter(pk=self.attribute.pk).update(
   497	                max_sort_order=F("max_sort_order") + 1
   498	            )
   499	            self.attribute.refresh_from_db()
   500	            self.sort_order = self.attribute.max_sort_order

   157	def resolve_variant(
   158	    info: ResolveInfo,
   159	    id,
   160	    sku,
   161	    external_reference,
   162	    *,
   163	    channel: Channel | None,
   164	    limited_channel_access: bool,
   165	    requestor,
   166	    requestor_has_access_to_all,
   167	):
   168	    connection_name = get_database_connection_name(info.context)
   169	    visible_products = (
   170	        models.Product.objects.using(connection_name)
   171	        .visible_to_user(requestor, channel, limited_channel_access)
   172	        .values_list("pk", flat=True)
   173	    )
   174	    qs = models.ProductVariant.objects.using(connection_name).filter(
   175	        product__id__in=visible_products
   176	    )
   177	    if not requestor_has_access_to_all:
   178	        qs = qs.available_in_channel(channel)
   179	    if id:
   180	        _, id = from_global_id_or_error(id, "ProductVariant")
   181	        return qs.filter(pk=id).first()
   182	    if sku:
   183	        return qs.filter(sku=sku).first()
   184	    return qs.filter(external_reference=external_reference).first()

   197	        tax_rate,

   200	    )

   205	            prior_price,

   207	            tax_calculation_strategy,
   208	            prices_entered_with_tax,
   209	        )
   210	    discount = _get_total_discount(undiscounted_price_taxed, discounted_price_taxed)
   211	
   212	    discount_prior = None
   213	    if prior_price_taxed is not None:

   259	    def annotate_quantities(self):
   260	        """Annotate the queryset with quantity-related fields.
   261	
   262	        This method annotates the queryset with the following fields:
   263	        - `quantity`: The total quantity in stock for each product variant.
   264	        - `quantity_allocated`: The total quantity allocated from the stock
   265	          for each product variant.
   266	        - `available_quantity`: The available quantity for each product variant,
   267	          which is calculated as `quantity - quantity_allocated`.
   268	        """
   269	
   270	        from saleor.warehouse.models import Allocation
   271	
   272	        allocations_subquery = (
   273	            Allocation.objects.using(self.db)
   274	            .filter(stock__product_variant=OuterRef("pk"))
   275	            .values("stock__product_variant")
   276	            .annotate(total_allocated=Coalesce(Sum("quantity_allocated"), 0))
   277	            .values("total_allocated")
   278	        )
   279	
   280	        return self.annotate(
   281	            quantity=Coalesce(Sum("stocks__quantity"), Value(0)),
   282	            quantity_allocated=Coalesce(
   283	                Subquery(allocations_subquery, output_field=models.IntegerField()),
   284	                Value(0),
   285	            ),
   286	            available_quantity=Case(
   287	                When(quantity_allocated=None, then=F("quantity")),
   288	                default=F("quantity")
   289	                - Coalesce(
   290	                    Subquery(allocations_subquery, output_field=models.IntegerField()),

   297	    def available_in_channel(self, channel: Channel | None):
   298	        from .models import ProductVariantChannelListing
   299	
   300	        if not channel:
   301	            return self.none()
   302	        channel_listings = (
   303	            ProductVariantChannelListing.objects.using(self.db)
   304	            .filter(price_amount__isnull=False, channel_id=channel.id)
   305	            .values("id")
   306	        )
   307	        return self.filter(Exists(channel_listings.filter(variant_id=OuterRef("pk"))))
   308	
   309	    def prefetched_for_webhook(self):
   310	        return self.prefetch_related(
   311	            "attributes__values",
   312	            "attributes__assignment__attribute",
   313	            "variant_media__media",
   314	        )
   315	
   316	    def visible_to_user(
   317	        self,
   318	        requestor: Union["User", "App", None],
   319	        channel: Channel | None,
   320	        limited_channel_access: bool,
   321	    ):
   322	        from .models import ALL_PRODUCTS_PERMISSIONS
   323	
   324	        # User with product permissions can see all variants. If channel is given,
   325	        # filter variants with product channel listings for this channel.
   326	        if has_one_of_permissions(requestor, ALL_PRODUCTS_PERMISSIONS):
   327	            if limited_channel_access:
   328	                if channel:
   329	                    return self.filter(product__channel_listings__channel_id=channel.id)
   330	                return self.none()
   331	            return self.all()
   332	
   333	        # If user has no permissions (customer) and channel is not given or is inactive,
   334	        # return no variants.
   335	        if not channel or not channel.is_active:
   336	            return self.none()
   337	
   338	        # If user has no permissions (customer) and channel is given, return variants
   339	        # that:
   340	        # - have a variant channel listing for this channel and the price is not null
   341	        # - have a product channel listing for this channel and the product is published
   342	        #  and visible in listings
   343	        variants = self.filter(
   344	            channel_listings__channel_id=channel.id,
   345	            channel_listings__price_amount__isnull=False,
   346	        )
   347	
   348	        today = datetime.datetime.now(tz=datetime.UTC)
   349	        variants = variants.filter(
   350	            Q(product__channel_listings__published_at__lte=today)
   351	            | Q(product__channel_listings__published_at__isnull=True),
   352	            product__channel_listings__is_published=True,
   353	            product__channel_listings__channel_id=channel.id,
   354	            product__channel_listings__visible_in_listings=True,
   355	        )
   356	        return variants
